 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.5: omskrive core_compliance.audit_filter_values med clients-fields-jsonb-walking
     2	--
     3	-- T1's audit_filter_values (20260514120006:9-86) walker kun top-level kolonner og
     4	-- hashes pii_level='direct'. Trin 10 udvider med special-case for core_identity.clients:
     5	-- walker fields-jsonb-keys og hashes hver key der har pii_level='direct' i
     6	-- client_field_definitions.
     7	--
     8	-- V2-fix (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): INGEN is_active-filter på direct-PII keys.
     9	-- Hashes alle direct-PII definitioner uanset is_active for at undgå datalæk når
    10	-- felt deaktiveres med eksisterende værdier stadig i clients.fields.
    11	--
    12	-- STABLE SECURITY DEFINER + set search_path = '' (matcher T1-pattern).
    13	-- Resten af T1-logik bevares uændret (top-level walking + unclassified-check).
    14	
    15	create or replace function core_compliance.audit_filter_values(
    16	  p_schema text,
    17	  p_table text,
    18	  p_values jsonb
    19	)
    20	returns jsonb
    21	language plpgsql stable security definer set search_path = ''
    22	as $$
    23	declare
    24	  v_result jsonb := p_values;
    25	  v_def record;
    26	  v_strict boolean := current_setting('stork.audit_filter_strict', true) = 'true';
    27	  v_has_defs boolean;
    28	  v_key text;
    29	  v_fields jsonb;
    30	  v_field_key text;
    31	  v_field_value jsonb;
    32	begin
    33	  if p_values is null then
    34	    return null;
    35	  end if;
    36	
    37	  -- Tjek om tabellen har klassificering.
    38	  select exists (
    39	    select 1 from core_compliance.data_field_definitions
    40	    where table_schema = p_schema and table_name = p_table
    41	  ) into v_has_defs;
    42	
    43	  if not v_has_defs then
    44	    if v_strict then
    45	      raise exception 'audit_filter_values: ingen klassificering for %.%', p_schema, p_table
    46	        using errcode = 'P0001';
    47	    else
    48	      raise warning 'audit_filter_values: ingen klassificering for %.% — værdier bevaret uændret', p_schema, p_table;
    49	      return p_values;
    50	    end if;
    51	  end if;
    52	
    53	  -- Walker top-level kolonner og hashes direct-PII (uændret T1-logik).
    54	  for v_def in
    55	    select column_name, pii_level
    56	    from core_compliance.data_field_definitions
    57	    where table_schema = p_schema and table_name = p_table
    58	  loop
    59	    if p_values ? v_def.column_name then
    60	      if v_def.pii_level = 'direct' then
    61	        v_result := jsonb_set(
    62	          v_result,
    63	          array[v_def.column_name],
    64	          to_jsonb(
    65	            'sha256:' ||
    66	            encode(extensions.digest((p_values->>v_def.column_name)::text, 'sha256'), 'hex')
    67	          )
    68	        );
    69	      end if;
    70	    end if;
    71	  end loop;
    72	
    73	  -- Trin 10 clients-special-case: walker clients.fields jsonb og hashes direct-PII keys
    74	  -- pr. client_field_definitions. V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): hashes
    75	  -- ALLE direct-PII definitioner, uafhængigt af is_active — ellers ville deaktivering
    76	  -- af et felt skabe datalæk for værdier der allerede ligger i eksisterende fields.
    77	  -- T10.1's clients_fields_is_object-CHECK garanterer at fields er object her,
    78	  -- men defensiv jsonb_typeof-tjek bevares.
    79	  if p_schema = 'core_identity'
    80	     and p_table = 'clients'
    81	     and v_result ? 'fields'
    82	     and jsonb_typeof(v_result -> 'fields') = 'object' then
    83	    v_fields := v_result -> 'fields';
    84	    for v_field_key in
    85	      select key from core_identity.client_field_definitions
    86	      where pii_level = 'direct'
    87	    loop
    88	      if v_fields ? v_field_key then
    89	        v_field_value := v_fields -> v_field_key;
    90	        if jsonb_typeof(v_field_value) is distinct from 'null' then
    91	          v_fields := jsonb_set(
    92	            v_fields,
    93	            array[v_field_key],
    94	            to_jsonb('sha256:' || encode(extensions.digest(v_field_value::text, 'sha256'), 'hex'))
    95	          );
    96	        end if;
    97	      end if;
    98	    end loop;
    99	    v_result := jsonb_set(v_result, array['fields'], v_fields);
   100	  end if;
   101	
   102	  -- Tjek for ukendte kolonner (uændret T1-logik).
   103	  for v_key in select jsonb_object_keys(p_values) loop
   104	    if not exists (
   105	      select 1 from core_compliance.data_field_definitions d
   106	      where d.table_schema = p_schema
   107	        and d.table_name = p_table
   108	        and d.column_name = v_key
   109	    ) then
   110	      if v_strict then
   111	        raise exception 'audit_filter_values: ukendt kolonne %.%.% i input', p_schema, p_table, v_key
   112	          using errcode = 'P0001';
   113	      else
   114	        raise warning 'audit_filter_values: ukendt kolonne %.%.% — værdi bevaret uændret', p_schema, p_table, v_key;
   115	      end if;
   116	    end if;
   117	  end loop;
   118	
   119	  return v_result;
   120	end;
   121	$$;
   122	
   123	comment on function core_compliance.audit_filter_values(text, text, jsonb) is
   124	  'T10.5 (V2 Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): T1-logik + core_identity.clients-special-case (jsonb-walking af fields for direct-PII keys pr. client_field_definitions; INGEN is_active-filter for at undgå datalæk ved felt-deaktivering). LENIENT-default; strict via stork.audit_filter_strict.';

exec
/bin/bash -lc 'nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260521000005_t10_clients_validate_fields.sql && nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260521000006_t10_seed_permissions.sql' in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.6: clients_validate_fields BEFORE INSERT/UPDATE-trigger
     2	--
     3	-- LENIENT-default: WARNING ved ukendte/inaktive keys i fields jsonb.
     4	-- Strict-mode: stork.clients_fields_strict='true' → raise exception.
     5	--
     6	-- Matcher D5's pattern (genskabt i nyt schema). Inaktive felt-definitioner
     7	-- behandles som "ukendt" — keys i fields jsonb der refererer dem giver warning.
     8	-- Det er forretningsmæssigt korrekt: deaktiveret felt skal ikke længere udfyldes.
     9	--
    10	-- T10.16 tilføjer denne funktion til LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS-allowlist
    11	-- (Codex runde 7 KRITISK): client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen
    12	-- status-kolonne; R7d-pattern gælder ikke.
    13	
    14	create or replace function core_identity.clients_validate_fields()
    15	returns trigger
    16	language plpgsql stable security definer set search_path = ''
    17	as $$
    18	declare
    19	  v_strict boolean;
    20	  v_unknown_keys text[];
    21	begin
    22	  if new.fields is null or jsonb_typeof(new.fields) <> 'object' then
    23	    return new;
    24	  end if;
    25	
    26	  v_strict := coalesce(
    27	    nullif(current_setting('stork.clients_fields_strict', true), ''),
    28	    'false'
    29	  ) = 'true';
    30	
    31	  select array_agg(n.key order by n.key)
    32	    into v_unknown_keys
    33	    from jsonb_each(new.fields) as n(key, value)
    34	    where not exists (
    35	      select 1 from core_identity.client_field_definitions cfd
    36	      where cfd.key = n.key and cfd.is_active = true
    37	    );
    38	
    39	  if v_unknown_keys is not null and array_length(v_unknown_keys, 1) > 0 then
    40	    if v_strict then
    41	      raise exception 'clients_validate_fields: ukendte/inaktive keys i fields: % (stork.clients_fields_strict=true)',
    42	        v_unknown_keys using errcode = '23514';
    43	    else
    44	      raise warning 'clients_validate_fields: ukendte/inaktive keys i fields (LENIENT - INSERT/UPDATE accepteret): %',
    45	        v_unknown_keys;
    46	    end if;
    47	  end if;
    48	
    49	  return new;
    50	end;
    51	$$;
    52	
    53	comment on function core_identity.clients_validate_fields() is
    54	  'T10.6: BEFORE INSERT/UPDATE-trigger på core_identity.clients. LENIENT-default WARNING ved ukendte/inaktive keys i fields. Strict via stork.clients_fields_strict=true. Filtrerer på cfd.is_active=true som lifecycle-signal (R7d-allowlist i T10.16).';
    55	
    56	create trigger clients_validate_fields
    57	  before insert or update on core_identity.clients
    58	  for each row execute function core_identity.clients_validate_fields();
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.13: seed permissions i grant-modellen
     2	--
     3	-- Tilføjer 2 nye pages (clients, client_field_definitions) under eksisterende
     4	-- org_structure-area + manage-tab pr. page + superadmin grants.
     5	--
     6	-- V6 fix (Code-validering #5): legacy role_page_permissions seedes IKKE.
     7	-- Grant-modellen (permission_pages + permission_tabs + role_permission_grants)
     8	-- er primær fra T9; legacy er kun fallback.
     9	--
    10	-- V4 fix (Codex V3 KRITISK): stork.t9_write_authorized SKAL sættes — T9-supplements
    11	-- INSERT-policies på permission_pages/tabs/role_permission_grants kræver det.
    12	--
    13	-- V9 robusthed (Codex V8 G-nummer ADOPT): queries scope'es til org_structure-area
    14	-- via JOIN på area_id. Forhindrer fremtidig kollision hvis samme page-navn
    15	-- tilføjes i andet area.
    16	
    17	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
    18	select set_config('stork.change_reason',
    19	  'T10.13: seed permissions for trin 10 RPCs i grant-modellen', false);
    20	-- T9-supplements INSERT-policies kræver session-var.
    21	select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', false);
    22	
    23	-- 1. Pages under org_structure-area
    24	with org_area as (
    25	  select id from core_identity.permission_areas where name = 'org_structure'
    26	)
    27	insert into core_identity.permission_pages (area_id, name)
    28	select org_area.id, page_name
    29	from org_area, (values ('clients'), ('client_field_definitions')) as p(page_name)
    30	on conflict (area_id, name) do nothing;
    31	
    32	-- 2. Tabs: 'manage' for hver ny page (V9: scope til org_structure-area)
    33	insert into core_identity.permission_tabs (page_id, name)
    34	select p.id, 'manage'
    35	from core_identity.permission_pages p
    36	join core_identity.permission_areas a on a.id = p.area_id
    37	where p.name in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')
    38	  and a.name = 'org_structure'
    39	on conflict (page_id, name) do nothing;
    40	
    41	-- 3. Superadmin grants på tab-niveau (V9: scope til org_structure-area)
    42	insert into core_identity.role_permission_grants
    43	  (role_id, area_id, page_id, tab_id, can_access, can_write, visibility)
    44	select
    45	  (select id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin'),
    46	  null, null, t.id,
    47	  true, true, 'all'
    48	from core_identity.permission_tabs t
    49	join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = t.page_id
    50	join core_identity.permission_areas a on a.id = p.area_id
    51	where p.name in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')
    52	  and a.name = 'org_structure'
    53	  and t.name = 'manage'
    54	on conflict (role_id, coalesce(area_id::text, ''),
    55	            coalesce(page_id::text, ''), coalesce(tab_id::text, ''))
    56	do nothing;

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.7b: klient-aktiv-check i client_node_place + _apply_client_place
     2	--
     3	-- Krav-dok §2.5.2: "Inaktiv klient bliver stående for historik, men kan ikke

     5	-- Krav-dok §3.4: "valideres at klienten faktisk findes" ved BÅDE oprettelse OG
     6	-- ændring (close er en ændring).
     7	--
     8	-- Superadmin-bypass på aktiv-check (Mathias 2026-05-21 "superadmin må alt").
     9	-- Sikkerheds-invariants (immutable key/pii_level i T10.10) bypasses IKKE.
    10	--
    11	-- V10 (Codex runde 9 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): apply-handler bruger employee-id-baseret
    12	-- helper (is_admin_by_employee_id) fordi auth.uid() er NULL i cron-apply-context.
    13	-- Bypass baseret på pending-rækkens requested_by OR approved_by.

    15	-- V9 (Codex runde 8 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): wrapper sætter t9_write_authorized FØR
    16	-- pending_change_request (T9-fundament-supplement INSERT-policy kræver det).
    17	--
    18	-- V14 (Code walk-through): client_node_close klient-eksistens-check (P0002) —

    21	-- ─── Ny helper: is_admin_by_employee_id (V10 Codex runde 9) ─────────────
    22	-- Admin-tjek via employee_id direkte (ikke auth.uid). Apply-handlers der
    23	-- kører i cron-context kan ikke bruge is_admin() — den returnerer false
    24	-- når auth.uid() er NULL.
    25	create or replace function core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(p_employee_id uuid)
    26	returns boolean
    27	language sql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
    28	as $$
    29	  select exists (
    30	    select 1
    31	    from core_identity.employees e
    32	    join core_identity.role_page_permissions p on p.role_id = e.role_id
    33	    where e.id = p_employee_id
    34	      and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
    35	      and p.page_key = 'system'
    36	      and p.tab_key = 'manage'
    37	      and p.scope = 'all'
    38	      and p.can_edit = true
    39	  );
    40	$$;
    41	
    42	comment on function core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(uuid) is
    43	  'V10/Trin 10: admin-tjek via employee_id (ikke auth.uid). Anvendes af apply-handlers der kører i cron-context uden auth.';
    44	
    45	-- Grant-pattern matcher is_admin() (T1-helpers-stubs:50): authenticated + anon + service_role.
    46	revoke all on function core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(uuid) from public;
    47	grant execute on function core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(uuid) to authenticated, anon, service_role;
    48	
    49	-- ─── client_node_place: tilføj klient-aktiv-check + session-var ─────────
    50	create or replace function core_identity.client_node_place(
    51	  p_client_id uuid,
    52	  p_node_id uuid,
    53	  p_effective_from date
    54	) returns uuid language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
    55	as $$
    56	declare
    57	  v_request_id uuid;
    58	  v_client_active boolean;
    59	begin
    60	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_placements', 'manage', true) then
    61	    raise exception 'permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    62	  end if;
    63	  -- Pre-check: node_id skal være team (uændret fra T9).
    64	  if not exists (
    65	    select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions
    66	    where node_id = p_node_id and node_type = 'team' and is_active = true
    67	      and effective_from <= current_date
    68	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > current_date)
    69	  ) then
    70	    raise exception 'client_placement_node_not_team_or_inactive: %', p_node_id using errcode = '22023';
    71	  end if;
    72	  -- V7/Trin 10 (krav-dok §3.4 + §2.5.2): klient skal findes og være aktiv.
    73	  select is_active into v_client_active
    74	    from core_identity.clients where id = p_client_id;
    75	  if not found then
    76	    raise exception 'client_not_found: %', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
    77	  end if;
    78	  if v_client_active = false and not core_identity.is_admin() then
    79	    raise exception 'client_inactive: % er sat is_active=false (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges som ny team-tilknytning)', p_client_id
    80	      using errcode = '22023';
    81	  end if;
    82	  -- V9 (Codex runde 8 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): pending_changes-INSERT-policy
    83	  -- (T9-fundament-supplement) kræver session-var.
    84	  perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
    85	  v_request_id := core_identity.pending_change_request(
    86	    'client_place', p_client_id,
    87	    jsonb_build_object(
    88	      'client_id', p_client_id::text,
    89	      'node_id', p_node_id::text,
    90	      'effective_from', p_effective_from::text
    91	    ),
    92	    p_effective_from
    93	  );
    94	  return v_request_id;
    95	end; $$;
    96	
    97	revoke execute on function core_identity.client_node_place(uuid, uuid, date) from public, anon;
    98	
    99	-- ─── client_node_close: tilføj eksistens-check + session-var ────────────
   100	-- INGEN aktiv-check (krav-dok §2.5.2 gælder ikke for lukning).
   101	-- V14: eksistens-check tilføjet (krav-dok §3.4 dækker BÅDE oprettelse OG ændring).
   102	create or replace function core_identity.client_node_close(
   103	  p_client_id uuid,
   104	  p_effective_from date
   105	) returns uuid language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   106	as $$
   107	declare v_request_id uuid;
   108	begin
   109	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_placements', 'manage', true) then
   110	    raise exception 'permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   111	  end if;
   112	  -- V14 (Code walk-through): klient-eksistens-check (krav-dok §3.4 — "valideres
   113	  -- at klienten faktisk findes" ved BÅDE oprettelse OG ændring). Close er ændring.
   114	  -- Forhindrer silent no-op på ikke-eksisterende client_id.
   115	  if not exists (select 1 from core_identity.clients where id = p_client_id) then
   116	    raise exception 'client_not_found: %', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
   117	  end if;
   118	  -- V9: pending_changes-INSERT-policy kræver session-var.
   119	  perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
   120	  v_request_id := core_identity.pending_change_request(
   121	    'client_close', p_client_id,
   122	    jsonb_build_object(
   123	      'client_id', p_client_id::text,
   124	      'effective_from', p_effective_from::text
   125	    ),
   126	    p_effective_from
   127	  );
   128	  return v_request_id;
   129	end; $$;
   130	
   131	revoke execute on function core_identity.client_node_close(uuid, date) from public, anon;
   132	
   133	-- ─── _apply_client_place: tilføj klient-eksistens + aktiv-check FØR INSERT/UPDATE
   134	create or replace function core_identity._apply_client_place(
   135	  p_payload jsonb,
   136	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   137	) returns void
   138	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   139	as $$
   140	declare
   141	  v_client_id uuid;
   142	  v_node_id uuid;
   143	  v_effective_from date;
   144	  v_client_active boolean;
   145	  v_active record;
   146	  v_requested_by uuid;
   147	  v_approved_by uuid;
   148	  v_admin_involved boolean;
   149	begin
   150	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   151	  v_node_id := (p_payload->>'node_id')::uuid;
   152	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   153	  if v_client_id is null or v_node_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   154	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + node_id + effective_from required'
   155	      using errcode = '22023';
   156	  end if;
   157	
   158	  -- Team-aktiv-check (uændret fra T9-supplement).
   159	  if not exists (
   160	    select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions
   161	    where node_id = v_node_id and node_type = 'team' and is_active = true
   162	      and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   163	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   164	  ) then
   165	    raise exception 'client_placement_requires_active_team: %', v_node_id
   166	      using errcode = 'P0001';
   167	  end if;
   168	
   169	  -- V7/Trin 10 (krav-dok §3.4 + §2.5.2): klient skal findes og være aktiv.
   170	  -- Fanger pending oprettet mens aktiv, applied efter deaktivering.
   171	  select is_active into v_client_active
   172	    from core_identity.clients where id = v_client_id;
   173	  if not found then
   174	    raise exception 'apply_client_place: client_not_found: %', v_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
   175	  end if;
   176	
   177	  -- V10 (Codex runde 9 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): bypass kan IKKE bruge is_admin()
   178	  -- fordi auth.uid() er NULL i cron-apply-context. Hent requester+approver fra
   179	  -- pending-rækken og tjek via employee-id-baseret helper.
   180	  v_admin_involved := false;
   181	  if p_pending_change_id is not null then
   182	    select requested_by, approved_by into v_requested_by, v_approved_by
   183	      from core_identity.pending_changes where id = p_pending_change_id;
   184	    v_admin_involved :=
   185	      core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(v_requested_by) or
   186	      (v_approved_by is not null and core_identity.is_admin_by_employee_id(v_approved_by));
   187	  end if;
   188	
   189	  if v_client_active = false and not v_admin_involved then
   190	    raise exception 'apply_client_place: client_inactive: % (krav-dok §2.5.2)', v_client_id
   191	      using errcode = 'P0001';
   192	  end if;
   193	
   194	  -- Resten af apply-handler-logikken er uændret fra T9-supplement
   195	  -- (20260520000000_t9_supplement.sql:321-350): find aktiv placement,
   196	  -- enten INSERT ny, UPDATE eksisterende eller split placement-række.
   197	  select * into v_active
   198	  from core_identity.client_node_placements
   199	  where client_id = v_client_id
   200	    and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   201	    and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   202	  limit 1;
   203	
   204	  if not found then
   205	    insert into core_identity.client_node_placements
   206	      (client_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   207	    select v_client_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from,
   208	      (select min(effective_from) from core_identity.client_node_placements
   209	       where client_id = v_client_id and effective_from > v_effective_from),
   210	      p_pending_change_id;
   211	  elsif v_active.effective_from = v_effective_from then
   212	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   213	    set node_id = v_node_id,
   214	        created_by_pending_change_id = coalesce(p_pending_change_id, created_by_pending_change_id),
   215	        updated_at = now()
   216	    where id = v_active.id;
   217	  else
   218	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   219	    set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   220	    where id = v_active.id;
   221	    insert into core_identity.client_node_placements
   222	      (client_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   223	    values
   224	      (v_client_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from, v_active.effective_to, p_pending_change_id);
   225	  end if;
   226	end; $$;
   227	
   228	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_place(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.8 + T10.9: client_upsert + client_set_active RPC'er
     2	--
     3	-- client_upsert: SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC. has_permission('clients', 'manage', true).
     4	-- INSERT-branch bruger p_is_active (default true for nye klienter).
     5	-- UPDATE-branch rør IKKE is_active (V8 Code walk-through #2: forhindrer
     6	-- utilsigtet reaktivering ved navne-ændring). UPDATE rør IKKE logo (V3 KRITISK-
     7	-- SIKKERHEDSHUL: forhindrer datatab). Toggle via client_set_active; logo via
     8	-- client_logo_set/clear.
     9	--
    10	-- client_set_active: dedikeret toggle-RPC. Adskilt RPC fordi UI-flow er distinkt
    11	-- ("deaktiver klient" vs "redigér klient"). Matcher krav-dok §3.1's distinct
    12	-- "Deaktivér klient"-funktion.
    13	
    14	-- Drop D5's signatur (Public.client_upsert blev droppet af T1; greenfield i core_identity).
    15	-- Ingen drop nødvendig — første gang vi opretter i core_identity.
    16	
    17	create or replace function core_identity.client_upsert(
    18	  p_name text,
    19	  p_fields jsonb,
    20	  p_change_reason text,
    21	  p_is_active boolean default true,
    22	  p_client_id uuid default null
    23	) returns uuid
    24	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
    25	as $$
    26	declare
    27	  v_id uuid;
    28	begin
    29	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', true) then
    30	    raise exception 'client_upsert: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    31	  end if;
    32	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
    33	    raise exception 'client_upsert: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
    34	  end if;
    35	  if p_name is null or length(trim(p_name)) = 0 then
    36	    raise exception 'client_upsert: name er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
    37	  end if;
    38	
    39	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    40	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
    41	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
    42	
    43	  if p_client_id is null then
    44	    -- INSERT: p_is_active anvendes (default true for nye klienter)
    45	    insert into core_identity.clients (name, fields, is_active)
    46	    values (p_name, coalesce(p_fields, '{}'::jsonb), p_is_active)
    47	    returning id into v_id;
    48	  else
    49	    -- V8 (Code walk-through #2): UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. Brug client_set_active.
    50	    -- V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): UPDATE rør IKKE logo. Brug client_logo_set/clear.
    51	    update core_identity.clients
    52	      set name = p_name,
    53	          fields = coalesce(p_fields, '{}'::jsonb)
    54	     where id = p_client_id
    55	     returning id into v_id;
    56	    if v_id is null then
    57	      raise exception 'client_upsert: client % findes ikke', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
    58	    end if;
    59	  end if;
    60	
    61	  return v_id;
    62	end;
    63	$$;
    64	
    65	comment on function core_identity.client_upsert(text, jsonb, text, boolean, uuid) is
    66	  'T10.8: INSERT-eller-UPDATE klient. UPDATE rør ikke is_active eller logo (V8 + V3 forhindrer utilsigtet reaktivering/datatab). Toggle via client_set_active; logo via client_logo_set/clear.';
    67	
    68	revoke all on function core_identity.client_upsert(text, jsonb, text, boolean, uuid) from public, anon;
    69	grant execute on function core_identity.client_upsert(text, jsonb, text, boolean, uuid) to authenticated;
    70	
    71	-- ─── client_set_active: toggler is_active uden at røre øvrige felter ─────
    72	create or replace function core_identity.client_set_active(
    73	  p_client_id uuid,
    74	  p_is_active boolean,
    75	  p_change_reason text
    76	) returns void
    77	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
    78	as $$
    79	begin
    80	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', true) then
    81	    raise exception 'client_set_active: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    82	  end if;
    83	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
    84	    raise exception 'client_set_active: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
    85	  end if;
    86	
    87	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    88	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
    89	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
    90	
    91	  update core_identity.clients
    92	    set is_active = p_is_active
    93	   where id = p_client_id;
    94	  if not found then
    95	    raise exception 'client_set_active: client % findes ikke', p_client_id using errcode = 'P0002';
    96	  end if;
    97	end;
    98	$$;
    99	
   100	comment on function core_identity.client_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) is
   101	  'T10.9: toggler is_active uden at røre øvrige felter (krav-dok §3.1 distinct Deaktivér-funktion). Matcher client_logo_set/clear-mønstret.';
   102	
   103	revoke all on function core_identity.client_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) from public, anon;
   104	grant execute on function core_identity.client_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) to authenticated;

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.10 + T10.10a: client_field_definition_upsert + _set_active
     2	--
     3	-- T10.10: SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC for client_field_definitions.
     4	-- has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true).
     5	-- INSERT-branch bruger p_is_active. UPDATE-branch rør IKKE is_active (V8).
     6	--
     7	-- V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): key + pii_level direct→non-direct
     8	-- effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions. Forhindrer audit-PII-datalæk:
     9	-- audit-hashing i clients.fields binder til key; eksisterende værdier ville
    10	-- pludselig skrives i klartekst hvis pii-niveau sænkes. SUPERADMIN BYPASSER IKKE
    11	-- (Mathias 2026-05-21: sikkerheds-invariants > "superadmin må alt").
    12	--
    13	-- T10.10a: client_field_definition_set_active — toggler is_active. Matcher
    14	-- krav-dok §3.2's distinct "Deaktivér felt-definition"-funktion + client_set_active-mønstret.
    15	
    16	create or replace function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
    17	  p_key text,
    18	  p_display_name text,
    19	  p_field_type text,
    20	  p_pii_level text,
    21	  p_change_reason text,
    22	  p_required boolean default false,
    23	  p_display_order integer default 0,
    24	  p_is_active boolean default true,
    25	  p_field_id uuid default null
    26	) returns uuid
    27	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
    28	as $$
    29	declare
    30	  v_id uuid;
    31	  v_existing_key text;
    32	  v_existing_pii text;
    33	begin
    34	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true) then
    35	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    36	  end if;
    37	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
    38	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
    39	  end if;
    40	  if p_pii_level not in ('none', 'indirect', 'direct') then
    41	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: pii_level skal vaere none/indirect/direct' using errcode = '22023';
    42	  end if;
    43	
    44	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    45	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
    46	  perform set_config('stork.allow_client_field_definitions_write', 'true', true);
    47	
    48	  if p_field_id is null then
    49	    insert into core_identity.client_field_definitions
    50	      (key, display_name, field_type, required, pii_level, display_order, is_active)
    51	    values
    52	      (p_key, p_display_name, p_field_type, p_required, p_pii_level, p_display_order, p_is_active)
    53	    returning id into v_id;
    54	  else
    55	    -- V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): forbyd key-rename og direct → non-direct
    56	    -- for eksisterende definitions. Audit-PII-hashing i clients.fields stoler på at
    57	    -- key+pii_level er stabile for værdier der allerede ligger i jsonb.
    58	    -- INGEN superadmin-bypass: sikkerheds-invariant > "superadmin må alt".
    59	    select key, pii_level into v_existing_key, v_existing_pii
    60	      from core_identity.client_field_definitions
    61	     where id = p_field_id;
    62	    if not found then
    63	      raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: field % findes ikke', p_field_id using errcode = 'P0002';
    64	    end if;
    65	    if v_existing_key is distinct from p_key then
    66	      raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: key er immutable (% -> %). For at omdøbe: marker eksisterende felt is_active=false og INSERT et nyt.', v_existing_key, p_key
    67	        using errcode = '22023', hint = 'Audit-PII-hash i clients.fields binder til key.';
    68	    end if;
    69	    if v_existing_pii = 'direct' and p_pii_level <> 'direct' then
    70	      raise exception 'client_field_definition_upsert: pii_level direct -> % afvist. Eksisterende vaerdier i clients.fields ville pludselig skrives i klartekst i audit-log.', p_pii_level
    71	        using errcode = '22023', hint = 'For at saenke pii-niveau: INSERT ny definition med ny key.';
    72	    end if;
    73	
    74	    -- V8 (Code walk-through #3): UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. Brug client_field_definition_set_active.
    75	    update core_identity.client_field_definitions
    76	      set display_name = p_display_name,
    77	          field_type = p_field_type,
    78	          required = p_required,
    79	          pii_level = p_pii_level,
    80	          display_order = p_display_order
    81	          -- key rør'es ikke (immutable verificeret ovenfor)
    82	          -- is_active rør IKKE (brug client_field_definition_set_active)
    83	     where id = p_field_id
    84	     returning id into v_id;
    85	  end if;
    86	
    87	  return v_id;
    88	end;
    89	$$;
    90	
    91	comment on function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(text, text, text, text, text, boolean, integer, boolean, uuid) is
    92	  'T10.10: INSERT-eller-UPDATE felt-definition. key + pii_level (direct→non-direct) immutable for eksisterende (V3 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL). UPDATE rør ikke is_active (V8). pii_level escalation none→indirect→direct tilladt. Sikkerheds-invariants bypasses ikke for superadmin.';
    93	
    94	revoke all on function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(text, text, text, text, text, boolean, integer, boolean, uuid) from public, anon;
    95	grant execute on function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(text, text, text, text, text, boolean, integer, boolean, uuid) to authenticated;
    96	
    97	-- ─── T10.10a: client_field_definition_set_active (V8 — krav-dok §3.2) ───
    98	create or replace function core_identity.client_field_definition_set_active(
    99	  p_field_id uuid,
   100	  p_is_active boolean,
   101	  p_change_reason text
   102	) returns void
   103	language plpgsql security definer set search_path = ''
   104	as $$
   105	begin
   106	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true) then
   107	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_set_active: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   108	  end if;
   109	  if p_change_reason is null or length(trim(p_change_reason)) = 0 then
   110	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_set_active: change_reason er paakraevet' using errcode = '22023';
   111	  end if;
   112	
   113	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   114	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', p_change_reason, true);
   115	  perform set_config('stork.allow_client_field_definitions_write', 'true', true);
   116	
   117	  update core_identity.client_field_definitions
   118	    set is_active = p_is_active
   119	   where id = p_field_id;
   120	  if not found then
   121	    raise exception 'client_field_definition_set_active: field % findes ikke', p_field_id using errcode = 'P0002';
   122	  end if;
   123	end;
   124	$$;
   125	
   126	comment on function core_identity.client_field_definition_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) is
   127	  'T10.10a (V8): toggler is_active uden at røre øvrige felter (krav-dok §3.2 distinct Deaktivér felt-definition).';
   128	
   129	revoke all on function core_identity.client_field_definition_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) from public, anon;
   130	grant execute on function core_identity.client_field_definition_set_active(uuid, boolean, text) to authenticated;

    83	-- ─── client_logo_get: SECURITY INVOKER read-RPC ─────────────────────────
    84	create or replace function core_identity.client_logo_get(p_client_id uuid)
    85	returns table (logo_bytes bytea, logo_content_type text, logo_filename text)
    86	language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.12: read-RPC'er for klient + felt-definitioner
     2	--
     3	-- client_get: hent én klient med metadata (has_logo bool — logo hentes via
     4	--             dedikeret client_logo_get for at undgå unødigt bytea-payload).
     5	-- client_list: list alle klienter (aktive + inaktive per krav-dok §3.1).
     6	-- client_field_definitions_list: list felt-definitioner (filter på is_active).
     7	--
     8	-- Tab-aware has_permission ('manage', false) per V6-fix: null-tab matcher
     9	-- ikke T10.13's tab-grants. SECURITY INVOKER — caller's role + RLS-policy gælder.
    10	
    11	create or replace function core_identity.client_get(p_client_id uuid)
    12	returns table (
    13	  id uuid,
    14	  name text,
    15	  fields jsonb,
    16	  is_active boolean,
    17	  logo_content_type text,
    18	  logo_filename text,
    19	  has_logo boolean,
    20	  created_at timestamptz,
    21	  updated_at timestamptz
    22	) language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
    23	as $$
    24	begin
    25	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', false) then
    26	    raise exception 'client_get: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    27	  end if;
    28	  return query
    29	    select c.id, c.name, c.fields, c.is_active,
    30	           c.logo_content_type, c.logo_filename,
    31	           c.logo_bytes is not null,
    32	           c.created_at, c.updated_at
    33	      from core_identity.clients c
    34	     where c.id = p_client_id;
    35	end; $$;
    36	
    37	comment on function core_identity.client_get(uuid) is
    38	  'T10.12: hent én klient. has_logo bool i stedet for bytea (logo via dedikeret client_logo_get). Tab-aware permission.';
    39	
    40	revoke all on function core_identity.client_get(uuid) from public, anon;
    41	grant execute on function core_identity.client_get(uuid) to authenticated;
    42	
    43	-- ─── client_list: alle klienter (aktive + inaktive per krav-dok §3.1) ───
    44	create or replace function core_identity.client_list()
    45	returns table (
    46	  id uuid, name text, is_active boolean,
    47	  has_logo boolean, created_at timestamptz, updated_at timestamptz
    48	) language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
    49	as $$
    50	begin
    51	  if not core_identity.has_permission('clients', 'manage', false) then
    52	    raise exception 'client_list: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    53	  end if;
    54	  return query
    55	    select c.id, c.name, c.is_active, c.logo_bytes is not null,
    56	           c.created_at, c.updated_at
    57	      from core_identity.clients c
    58	     order by c.name asc;
    59	end; $$;
    60	
    61	comment on function core_identity.client_list() is
    62	  'T10.12: list alle klienter (aktive + inaktive per krav-dok §3.1 "Hent klient-liste"). Tab-aware permission.';
    63	
    64	revoke all on function core_identity.client_list() from public, anon;
    65	grant execute on function core_identity.client_list() to authenticated;
    66	
    67	-- ─── client_field_definitions_list: list felt-def ───────────────────────
    68	-- p_include_inactive default false: standard returnerer kun aktive (krav-dok §3.2
    69	-- "Hent felt-definitioner: alle aktive"). p_include_inactive=true for fuld liste.
    70	--
    71	-- T10.16 tilføjer denne RPC til LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS (Codex V1
    72	-- MELLEM #3): client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen status-kolonne.
    73	create or replace function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(p_include_inactive boolean default false)
    74	returns setof core_identity.client_field_definitions
    75	language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
    76	as $$
    77	begin
    78	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', false) then
    79	    raise exception 'client_field_definitions_list: permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
    80	  end if;
    81	  return query
    82	    select * from core_identity.client_field_definitions
    83	     where p_include_inactive or is_active = true
    84	     order by display_order, key;
    85	end; $$;
    86	
    87	comment on function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(boolean) is
    88	  'T10.12: list felt-definitioner. Default kun aktive (krav-dok §3.2). p_include_inactive=true for fuld liste. R7d-allowlist via T10.16.';
    89	
    90	revoke all on function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(boolean) from public, anon;
    91	grant execute on function core_identity.client_field_definitions_list(boolean) to authenticated;
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.13b: seed legacy role_page_permissions for M1-test compatibility
     2	--
     3	-- T10.13 seeder kun grant-modellen (permission_pages + permission_tabs +
     4	-- role_permission_grants). M1-permission-matrix-test scanner alle RPCs der
     5	-- kalder has_permission(...) og verificerer at superadmin har row i legacy
     6	-- role_page_permissions-tabel. Uden legacy-row fejler M1-test.
     7	--
     8	-- Legacy-pattern bevares til M1-test passes; senere kan legacy-rows fjernes
     9	-- når M1-test refactores til at læse grant-modellen direkte (G-nummer-kandidat).
    10	
    11	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
    12	select set_config('stork.allow_role_page_permissions_write', 'true', false);
    13	select set_config('stork.change_reason',
    14	  'T10.13b: seed legacy role_page_permissions for clients + client_field_definitions (M1-test compat)', false);
    15	
    16	insert into core_identity.role_page_permissions
    17	  (role_id, page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit, scope)
    18	select (select id from core_identity.roles where name = 'superadmin'),
    19	       page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit, 'all'
    20	from (values
    21	  ('clients',                  'manage', true, true),
    22	  ('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true, true)
    23	) as perms(page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit)
    24	on conflict (role_id, page_key, coalesce(tab_key, '')) do nothing;

codex
De centrale write-RPC’er sætter de forventede session-vars, og tabellerne har både DML-GRANT og RLS-policies. Jeg tjekker nu testdækning og T9-dispatch/pending-flowet, hvor planens end-to-end-krav typisk kan falde igennem.

/bin/bash -lc 'nl -ba supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_lifecycle.sql' in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 10 T10.15: client lifecycle smoke-test
     2	--
     3	-- Dækker: client_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), client_set_active toggle,
     4	-- client_get returnerer korrekt is_active. has_permission-spærring uden
     5	-- permission-row. is_active toggle bevarer øvrige felter. V8: client_upsert
     6	-- UPDATE rør IKKE is_active (set inaktiv → upsert med ny name → is_active
     7	-- stadig false).
     8	--
     9	-- BEGIN/ROLLBACK påkrævet for hermetisk test (clients ikke på TX_WRAP_REQUIRED,
    10	-- men test-disciplin).
    11	
    12	begin;
    13	
    14	do $test$
    15	declare
    16	  v_client_id uuid;
    17	  v_returned_is_active boolean;
    18	  v_returned_name text;
    19	  v_caught text;
    20	  v_superadmin_auth_id uuid;
    21	begin
    22	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    23	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T10 lifecycle smoke fixture', true);
    24	
    25	  -- T9-pattern: simulér authenticated superadmin via request.jwt.claim.sub
    26	  select e.auth_user_id into v_superadmin_auth_id
    27	  from core_identity.employees e
    28	  join core_identity.roles r on r.id = e.role_id
    29	  where r.name = 'superadmin'
    30	    and e.auth_user_id is not null
    31	    and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
    32	  limit 1;
    33	  if v_superadmin_auth_id is null then
    34	    raise exception 'SETUP FAIL: ingen aktiv superadmin';
    35	  end if;
    36	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_superadmin_auth_id::text, true);
    37	
    38	  -- ─── T1: client_upsert INSERT ───────────────────────────────────────
    39	  v_client_id := core_identity.client_upsert(
    40	    'Acme A/S',
    41	    '{"telefon": "+45 12345678"}'::jsonb,
    42	    'T10-lifecycle T1: opret aktiv klient',
    43	    true,
    44	    null
    45	  );
    46	
    47	  if v_client_id is null then
    48	    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: client_upsert returnerede null';
    49	  end if;
    50	
    51	  -- Verificér via client_get
    52	  select is_active, name into v_returned_is_active, v_returned_name
    53	  from core_identity.client_get(v_client_id);
    54	
    55	  if v_returned_is_active <> true then
    56	    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: is_active=true forventet, fik %', v_returned_is_active;
    57	  end if;
    58	  if v_returned_name <> 'Acme A/S' then
    59	    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: name="Acme A/S" forventet, fik %', v_returned_name;
    60	  end if;
    61	
    62	  -- ─── T2: client_set_active(false) → klient inaktiv ─────────────────
    63	  perform core_identity.client_set_active(v_client_id, false, 'T10-lifecycle T2: deaktiver');
    64	
    65	  select is_active into v_returned_is_active from core_identity.client_get(v_client_id);
    66	  if v_returned_is_active <> false then
    67	    raise exception 'T2 FAIL: is_active=false forventet efter set_active(false), fik %', v_returned_is_active;
    68	  end if;
    69	
    70	  -- ─── T3 (V8 KRITISK): client_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active ──────
    71	  -- Klient er inaktiv. Vi opdaterer name. is_active SKAL forblive false.
    72	  perform core_identity.client_upsert(
    73	    'Acme A/S (omdøbt)',
    74	    '{"telefon": "+45 12345678"}'::jsonb,
    75	    'T10-lifecycle T3: ren navne-ændring',
    76	    true,  -- p_is_active=true (default); UPDATE-branch skal ignorere den
    77	    v_client_id
    78	  );
    79	
    80	  select is_active, name into v_returned_is_active, v_returned_name
    81	  from core_identity.client_get(v_client_id);
    82	  if v_returned_is_active <> false then
    83	    raise exception 'T3 FAIL (V8 KRITISK): client_upsert UPDATE rør IKKE is_active. Forventet false, fik % (utilsigtet reaktivering!)', v_returned_is_active;
    84	  end if;
    85	  if v_returned_name <> 'Acme A/S (omdøbt)' then
    86	    raise exception 'T3 FAIL: name="Acme A/S (omdøbt)" forventet, fik %', v_returned_name;
    87	  end if;
    88	
    89	  -- ─── T4: client_set_active(true) → reaktiver ───────────────────────
    90	  perform core_identity.client_set_active(v_client_id, true, 'T10-lifecycle T4: reaktiver');
    91	  select is_active into v_returned_is_active from core_identity.client_get(v_client_id);
    92	  if v_returned_is_active <> true then
    93	    raise exception 'T4 FAIL: is_active=true forventet efter set_active(true), fik %', v_returned_is_active;
    94	  end if;
    95	
    96	  raise notice 'T10 lifecycle smoke: ALL TESTS PASSED (T1-T4)';
    97	end;

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.15: clients_validate_fields smoke-test

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.15: client active-check smoke-test (V7 + V10 cron-context + V13 undo-setup + V14)
     2	--
     3	-- V13-SETUP (Codex runde 12 TEKNISK-BLOKERING): efter begin; sætter testen
     4	-- stork.t9_write_authorized='true' og UPDATE undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 0
     5	-- for at omgå T9's 24-timers default-undo-periode. Uden dette rammer apply-vej
     6	-- not_yet_due før aktiv-check.
     7	--
     8	-- Tests:
     9	--   T1: opret aktiv klient → client_node_place → pending → approve+apply → success
    10	--   T2: deaktiver klient → client_node_place på samme klient + nyt team → 22023
    11	--   T3: opret pending mens aktiv → deaktiver → apply → P0001 (apply-path-scenarie)
    12	--   T4: client_node_close på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check)
    13	--   T4a (V14): client_node_close på non-existent client_id → P0002 client_not_found
    14	--   T5: superadmin-bypass wrapper — place på inaktiv klient → success
    15	--   T6 (V10 cron): superadmin opretter pending → deaktiver → cron-apply → success (requester bypass)
    16	--   T7 (V10): non-admin opretter, admin approver → deaktiver → cron-apply → success (approver bypass)
    17	--   T8 (V10): begge non-admin → deaktiver → cron-apply → P0001 (ingen admin)
    18	
    19	begin;
    20	
    21	-- V13-SETUP: omgå T9's 24-timers undo-periode
    22	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    23	select set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T10 active-check smoke setup', true);
    24	select set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
    25	update core_identity.undo_settings
    26	  set undo_period_seconds = 0
    27	  where change_type in ('client_place', 'client_close');
    28	
    29	do $test$
    30	declare
    31	  v_client_id uuid;
    32	  v_team_node_id uuid := gen_random_uuid();
    33	  v_team_b_node_id uuid := gen_random_uuid();
    34	  v_root_id uuid := gen_random_uuid();
    35	  v_admin_role_id uuid;
    36	  v_normal_role_id uuid;
    37	  v_admin_emp_id uuid;
    38	  v_normal_emp_id uuid;
    39	  v_uuid_suffix text;
    40	  v_pending_id uuid;
    41	  v_caught text;
    42	begin
    43	  v_uuid_suffix := replace(gen_random_uuid()::text, '-', '');
    44	
    45	  -- Setup: roles + employees + org-tree (minimal)
    46	  perform set_config('stork.allow_roles_write', 'true', true);
    47	  insert into core_identity.roles (name, description)
    48	  values ('t10_active_admin_' || v_uuid_suffix, 'admin')
    49	  returning id into v_admin_role_id;
    50	  insert into core_identity.roles (name, description)
    51	  values ('t10_active_normal_' || v_uuid_suffix, 'normal')
    52	  returning id into v_normal_role_id;
    53	
    54	  -- Admin-rolle får system/manage + client_placements/manage
    55	  perform set_config('stork.allow_role_page_permissions_write', 'true', true);
    56	  insert into core_identity.role_page_permissions (role_id, page_key, tab_key, can_view, can_edit, scope)
    57	  values
    58	    (v_admin_role_id, 'system', 'manage', true, true, 'all'),
    59	    (v_admin_role_id, 'client_placements', 'manage', true, true, 'all'),
    60	    (v_admin_role_id, 'clients', 'manage', true, true, 'all'),
    61	    (v_normal_role_id, 'client_placements', 'manage', true, true, 'all'),
    62	    (v_normal_role_id, 'clients', 'manage', true, true, 'all');
    63	
    64	  perform set_config('stork.allow_employees_write', 'true', true);
    65	  insert into core_identity.employees (first_name, last_name, email, role_id)
    66	  values ('Admin', 'Test', 'admin_' || v_uuid_suffix || '@test.invalid', v_admin_role_id)
    67	  returning id into v_admin_emp_id;
    68	  insert into core_identity.employees (first_name, last_name, email, role_id)
    69	  values ('Normal', 'Test', 'normal_' || v_uuid_suffix || '@test.invalid', v_normal_role_id)
    70	  returning id into v_normal_emp_id;
    71	
    72	  -- Setup: org-tree med team
    73	  perform set_config('stork.allow_org_nodes_write', 'true', true);
    74	  insert into core_identity.org_nodes (id) values (v_team_node_id), (v_team_b_node_id), (v_root_id);
    75	  perform set_config('stork.allow_org_node_versions_write', 'true', true);
    76	  insert into core_identity.org_node_versions
    77	    (node_id, name, parent_id, node_type, is_active, effective_from)
    78	  values (v_team_node_id, 't10-active team A', v_root_id, 'team', true, current_date - 5),
    79	         (v_team_b_node_id, 't10-active team B', v_root_id, 'team', true, current_date - 5);
    80	
    81	  -- Setup: opret aktiv klient
    82	  perform set_config('stork.allow_clients_write', 'true', true);
    83	  insert into core_identity.clients (name) values ('t10-active klient')
    84	  returning id into v_client_id;
    85	
    86	  -- ─── T4a (V14): client_node_close på non-existent client_id → P0002 ─
    87	  -- Direct apply (bypasser wrapper-permission); test wrapper-call gennem direkte funktion
    88	  -- Pragmatisk: wrapper kræver auth-context. Test via direct apply skip wrapper.
    89	  -- Skiftet til simpler test: assertion at trigger-funktion er korrekt.
    90	  -- (Wrapper-test ville kræve mock auth.uid — for kompleks for smoke).
    91	  -- T4a verificeres via direkte SQL check at funktionen rejser når client mangler
    92	  -- (kan ikke nemt teste fra trigger-context; verificeres i build via integration)
    93	  raise notice 'T4a (V14): wrapper-eksistens-check verificeres via integration; direct apply-handler tester nedenfor';
    94	
    95	  -- ─── T3-pattern: apply-handler eksistens-check (P0002) ──────────────
    96	  begin
    97	    v_caught := null;
    98	    perform core_identity._apply_client_place(
    99	      jsonb_build_object('client_id', gen_random_uuid()::text,
   100	                         'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   101	                         'effective_from', current_date::text),
   102	      null  -- p_pending_change_id null
   103	    );
   104	  exception when sqlstate 'P0002' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   105	  if v_caught is null then
   106	    raise exception 'apply-eksistens-check FAIL: _apply_client_place skal P0002 ved ikke-eksisterende client_id';
   107	  end if;
   108	
   109	  -- ─── T-aktiv: apply-handler aktiv-check (P0001) ─────────────────────
   110	  -- Deaktiver klient
   111	  update core_identity.clients set is_active = false where id = v_client_id;
   112	
   113	  -- Apply uden pending-row → ingen admin-bypass → forventet P0001
   114	  begin
   115	    v_caught := null;
   116	    perform core_identity._apply_client_place(
   117	      jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_id::text,
   118	                         'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   119	                         'effective_from', current_date::text),
   120	      null
   121	    );
   122	  exception when sqlstate 'P0001' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   123	  if v_caught is null then
   124	    raise exception 'aktiv-check FAIL: _apply_client_place skal P0001 ved inaktiv klient uden admin-bypass';
   125	  end if;
   126	
   127	  -- Reaktiver
   128	  update core_identity.clients set is_active = true where id = v_client_id;
   129	
   130	  -- ─── T-success: apply på aktiv klient → success ─────────────────────
   131	  perform core_identity._apply_client_place(
   132	    jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_id::text,
   133	                       'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   134	                       'effective_from', current_date::text),
   135	    null
   136	  );
   137	  if not exists (
   138	    select 1 from core_identity.client_node_placements
   139	    where client_id = v_client_id and node_id = v_team_node_id and effective_to is null
   140	  ) then
   141	    raise exception 'success FAIL: placement skulle eksistere';
   142	  end if;
   143	
   144	  -- ─── T6 (V10 cron-context): pending med admin-requester ──────────────
   145	  -- Opret pending-row mens klient aktiv. Deaktiver. Apply. Bypass via requested_by.
   146	  declare v_pending_admin_id uuid := gen_random_uuid(); v_client_b_id uuid; begin
   147	    insert into core_identity.clients (name) values ('t10-active klient B')
   148	    returning id into v_client_b_id;
   149	
   150	    perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
   151	    insert into core_identity.pending_changes
   152	      (id, change_type, target_id, payload, effective_from, requested_by,
   153	       approved_by, approved_at, undo_deadline, status)
   154	    values
   155	      (v_pending_admin_id, 'client_place', v_client_b_id,
   156	       jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_b_id::text,
   157	                          'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   158	                          'effective_from', current_date::text),
   159	       current_date, v_admin_emp_id, v_admin_emp_id, now(), now(), 'approved');
   160	
   161	    -- Deaktiver klient
   162	    update core_identity.clients set is_active = false where id = v_client_b_id;
   163	
   164	    -- Apply: admin-requester → bypass → success
   165	    perform core_identity._apply_client_place(
   166	      jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_b_id::text,
   167	                         'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   168	                         'effective_from', current_date::text),
   169	      v_pending_admin_id
   170	    );
   171	
   172	    if not exists (
   173	      select 1 from core_identity.client_node_placements
   174	      where client_id = v_client_b_id and effective_to is null
   175	    ) then
   176	      raise exception 'T6 FAIL (V10): admin-requester bypass skulle tillade placement på inaktiv klient';
   177	    end if;
   178	  end;
   179	
   180	  -- ─── T8 (V10): pending med non-admin requester+approver → fail ───────
   181	  declare v_pending_normal_id uuid := gen_random_uuid(); v_client_c_id uuid; begin
   182	    insert into core_identity.clients (name) values ('t10-active klient C')
   183	    returning id into v_client_c_id;
   184	
   185	    perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
   186	    insert into core_identity.pending_changes
   187	      (id, change_type, target_id, payload, effective_from, requested_by,
   188	       approved_by, approved_at, undo_deadline, status)
   189	    values
   190	      (v_pending_normal_id, 'client_place', v_client_c_id,
   191	       jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_c_id::text,
   192	                          'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   193	                          'effective_from', current_date::text),
   194	       current_date, v_normal_emp_id, v_normal_emp_id, now(), now(), 'approved');
   195	
   196	    update core_identity.clients set is_active = false where id = v_client_c_id;
   197	
   198	    begin
   199	      v_caught := null;
   200	      perform core_identity._apply_client_place(
   201	        jsonb_build_object('client_id', v_client_c_id::text,
   202	                           'node_id', v_team_node_id::text,
   203	                           'effective_from', current_date::text),
   204	        v_pending_normal_id
   205	      );
   206	    exception when sqlstate 'P0001' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
   207	    if v_caught is null then
   208	      raise exception 'T8 FAIL (V10): ingen admin involveret → bypass skal IKKE virke';
   209	    end if;
   210	  end;
   211	
   212	  raise notice 'T10 active-check smoke: tests passed (eksistens + aktiv + cron-bypass + non-admin-fail)';
   213	end;
   214	$test$;
   215	
   216	rollback;

    30

    47	  );
    48	
    49	  -- ─── T1: client_logo_set + client_logo_get ──────────────────────────
    50	  perform core_identity.client_logo_set(
    51	    v_client_id, v_test_logo, 'image/png', 'logo.png',
    52	    'T10-logo T1: upload logo'
    53	  );
    54	
    55	  select logo_bytes, logo_content_type, logo_filename
    56	    into v_returned_bytes, v_returned_ct, v_returned_fn
    57	    from core_identity.client_logo_get(v_client_id);
    58	  if v_returned_bytes is null or v_returned_bytes <> v_test_logo then
    59	    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: client_logo_get returnerede ikke set bytes';
    60	  end if;
    61	  if v_returned_ct <> 'image/png' or v_returned_fn <> 'logo.png' then
    62	    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: metadata mismatch';
    63	  end if;
    64	
    65	  -- ─── T2 (V3 KRITISK): client_upsert UPDATE bevarer logo ─────────────
    66	  select logo_bytes, logo_filename into v_logo_bytes_before, v_logo_filename_before
    67	    from core_identity.clients where id = v_client_id;
    68	
    69	  perform core_identity.client_upsert(
    70	    'Logo Test Klient (omdøbt)', '{}'::jsonb,
    71	    'T10-logo T2: ren navne-ændring — logo skal bevares',
    72	    true, v_client_id
    73	  );
    74	
    75	  select logo_bytes, logo_filename into v_logo_bytes_after, v_logo_filename_after
    76	    from core_identity.clients where id = v_client_id;
    77	
    78	  if v_logo_bytes_after is distinct from v_logo_bytes_before then
    79	    raise exception 'T2 FAIL (V3 KRITISK): client_upsert UPDATE skal IKKE røre logo_bytes!';
    80	  end if;
    81	  if v_logo_filename_after is distinct from v_logo_filename_before then
    82	    raise exception 'T2 FAIL (V3 KRITISK): client_upsert UPDATE skal IKKE røre logo_filename!';
    83	  end if;
    84	
    85	  -- ─── T3: client_logo_set fejler hvis ét felt NULL ───────────────────
    86	  begin
    87	    v_caught := null;
    88	    perform core_identity.client_logo_set(
    89	      v_client_id, v_test_logo, 'image/png', null, 'T10-logo T3: partiel'
    90	    );
    91	  exception when sqlstate '22023' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
    92	  if v_caught is null then
    93	    raise exception 'T3 FAIL: client_logo_set med NULL filename skal afvises';
    94	  end if;
    95	
    96	  -- ─── T4: client_logo_clear nulstiller alle tre felter ───────────────
    97	  perform core_identity.client_logo_clear(v_client_id, 'T10-logo T4: fjern logo');
    98	
    99	  select logo_bytes, logo_content_type, logo_filename
   100	    into v_returned_bytes, v_returned_ct, v_returned_fn
   101	    from core_identity.clients where id = v_client_id;
   102	  if v_returned_bytes is not null or v_returned_ct is not null or v_returned_fn is not null then
   103	    raise exception 'T4 FAIL: client_logo_clear skal nulstille alle tre felter';
   104	  end if;
   105	
   106	  -- ─── T5 (V12 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): audit-PII-hashing af logo_filename
   107	  -- audit_log skrives af stork_audit-trigger. Vi verificerer at logo_filename
   108	  -- + logo_bytes er sha256-hashed i new_values (pii_level='direct' i T10.4).
   109	  perform core_identity.client_logo_set(
   110	    v_client_id, v_test_logo_2, 'image/png', 'personlig-info-logo.png',
   111	    'T10-logo T5: upload til audit-test'
   112	  );
   113	
   114	  -- Audit-log INSERT'er via after-trigger. SELECT seneste UPDATE-row for clients.
   115	  if not exists (
   116	    select 1 from core_compliance.audit_log
   117	    where table_schema = 'core_identity'
   118	      and table_name = 'clients'
   119	      and record_id = v_client_id
   120	      and operation = 'UPDATE'
   121	      and (new_values ->> 'logo_filename') like 'sha256:%'
   122	      and (new_values ->> 'logo_bytes') like 'sha256:%'
   123	  ) then
   124	    raise exception 'T5 FAIL (V12 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): logo_filename + logo_bytes skal være SHA256-hashed i audit_log.new_values';
   125	  end if;
   126	
   127	  -- logo_content_type forbliver klartekst (pii_level='none')
   128	  if not exists (
   129	    select 1 from core_compliance.audit_log
   130	    where table_schema = 'core_identity'
   131	      and table_name = 'clients'
   132	      and record_id = v_client_id
   133	      and operation = 'UPDATE'
   134	      and (new_values ->> 'logo_content_type') = 'image/png'
   135	  ) then
   136	    raise exception 'T5 FAIL: logo_content_type skal være klartekst i audit_log (pii_level=none)';
   137	  end if;
   138	
   139	  raise notice 'T10 logo smoke: ALL TESTS PASSED (T1-T5)';
   140	end;
   141	$test$;
   142	
   143	rollback;

     1	-- Trin 10 T10.15: client_field_definitions smoke-test
     2	--
     3	-- Dækker: client_field_definition_upsert (INSERT + UPDATE), is_active toggle
     4	-- via _set_active, client_field_definitions_list respekterer p_include_inactive.
     5	-- V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): UPDATE af key afvises (errcode 22023).
     6	-- UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level
     7	-- none → indirect → direct accepteres. V8: UPDATE rør IKKE is_active.
     8	
     9	begin;
    10	
    11	do $test$
    12	declare
    13	  v_field_id uuid;
    14	  v_caught text;
    15	  v_count integer;
    16	  v_superadmin_auth_id uuid;
    17	begin
    18	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
    19	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T10 cfd smoke', true);
    20	
    21	  -- T9-pattern: simulér authenticated superadmin via request.jwt.claim.sub
    22	  select e.auth_user_id into v_superadmin_auth_id
    23	  from core_identity.employees e
    24	  join core_identity.roles r on r.id = e.role_id
    25	  where r.name = 'superadmin'
    26	    and e.auth_user_id is not null
    27	    and core_identity.is_active_employee_state(e.anonymized_at, e.termination_date)
    28	  limit 1;
    29	  if v_superadmin_auth_id is null then
    30	    raise exception 'SETUP FAIL: ingen aktiv superadmin med auth_user_id';
    31	  end if;
    32	  perform set_config('request.jwt.claim.sub', v_superadmin_auth_id::text, true);
    33	
    34	  -- ─── T1: INSERT felt-definition ─────────────────────────────────────
    35	  v_field_id := core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
    36	    'telefon',           -- p_key
    37	    'Telefon',           -- p_display_name
    38	    'phone',             -- p_field_type
    39	    'direct',            -- p_pii_level
    40	    'T10-cfd T1: opret', -- p_change_reason
    41	    false,               -- p_required
    42	    10,                  -- p_display_order
    43	    true,                -- p_is_active
    44	    null                 -- p_field_id (INSERT)
    45	  );
    46	
    47	  if v_field_id is null then
    48	    raise exception 'T1 FAIL: cfd_upsert INSERT returnerede null';
    49	  end if;
    50	
    51	  -- ─── T2 (V3 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): UPDATE af key afvises ──────────
    52	  begin
    53	    v_caught := null;
    54	    perform core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
    55	      'mobil',                  -- p_key (ÆNDRET fra 'telefon')
    56	      'Telefon',
    57	      'phone',
    58	      'direct',
    59	      'T10-cfd T2: forsøg key-rename',
    60	      false, 10, true,
    61	      v_field_id
    62	    );
    63	  exception when sqlstate '22023' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
    64	  if v_caught is null then
    65	    raise exception 'T2 FAIL (V3 KRITISK): UPDATE af key skal afvises (immutable)';
    66	  end if;
    67	
    68	  -- ─── T3 (V3 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): pii_level direct → none afvises
    69	  begin
    70	    v_caught := null;
    71	    perform core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
    72	      'telefon', 'Telefon', 'phone',
    73	      'none',                   -- p_pii_level DOWNGRADED fra 'direct'
    74	      'T10-cfd T3: forsøg pii-downgrade',
    75	      false, 10, true, v_field_id
    76	    );
    77	  exception when sqlstate '22023' then v_caught := 'ok'; end;
    78	  if v_caught is null then
    79	    raise exception 'T3 FAIL (V3 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL): pii_level direct → non-direct skal afvises';
    80	  end if;
    81	
    82	  -- ─── T4: UPDATE display_order accepteres (ikke immutable) ──────────
    83	  perform core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
    84	    'telefon', 'Telefon (primær)', 'phone', 'direct',
    85	    'T10-cfd T4: opdater display_name + sortering',
    86	    true, 5, true, v_field_id
    87	  );
    88	
    89	  -- ─── T5 (V8 Code walk-through): UPDATE rør IKKE is_active ──────────
    90	  perform core_identity.client_field_definition_set_active(v_field_id, false, 'T10-cfd T5a: deaktiver');
    91	  -- UPDATE med p_is_active=true (default): skal ikke reaktivere
    92	  perform core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
    93	    'telefon', 'Telefon', 'phone', 'direct',
    94	    'T10-cfd T5b: ren UPDATE med default p_is_active=true',
    95	    false, 10, true, v_field_id
    96	  );
    97	
    98	  select count(*) into v_count
    99	  from core_identity.client_field_definitions
   100	  where id = v_field_id and is_active = false;
   101	  if v_count <> 1 then
   102	    raise exception 'T5 FAIL (V8): client_field_definition_upsert UPDATE skulle IKKE reaktivere; fandt count=%', v_count;
   103	  end if;
   104	
   105	  -- ─── T6: pii_level none → indirect → direct (escalation) accepteret
   106	  declare v_field_b_id uuid; begin
   107	    v_field_b_id := core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
   108	      'kommentar', 'Kommentar', 'text', 'none',
   109	      'T10-cfd T6a: opret med none', false, 20, true, null
   110	    );
   111	    -- Escalate none → indirect
   112	    perform core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
   113	      'kommentar', 'Kommentar', 'text', 'indirect',
   114	      'T10-cfd T6b: escalate til indirect', false, 20, true, v_field_b_id
   115	    );
   116	    -- Escalate indirect → direct
   117	    perform core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
   118	      'kommentar', 'Kommentar', 'text', 'direct',
   119	      'T10-cfd T6c: escalate til direct', false, 20, true, v_field_b_id
   120	    );
   121	  end;
   122	
   123	  raise notice 'T10 cfd smoke: ALL TESTS PASSED (T1-T6)';
   124	end;
   125	$test$;
   126	
   127	rollback;

/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql | sed -n '1,230p'" in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 9 / §4 trin 9 Step 5: client_node_placements (uden client-FK) + apply-handlers.
     2	--
     3	-- Plan V6 Beslutning 3 + Valg 4: client_id som uuid UDEN FK (klient-skabelon
     4	-- bygges i trin 10; FK tilføjes der via ALTER TABLE). client_id på
     5	-- FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs.
     6	--
     7	-- Plan V6 krav-dok 3.4: klient kun tilknyttet team-knuder. Trigger validerer
     8	-- node_type='team' på node_id.
     9	--
    10	-- Apply-handlers: _apply_client_place + _apply_client_close.
    11	
    12	-- no-dedup-key: versioneret placement-tabel; partial UNIQUE (client_id) WHERE effective_to IS NULL er natural dedup.
    13	create table core_identity.client_node_placements (
    14	  id uuid primary key default gen_random_uuid(),
    15	  client_id uuid not null,  -- UDEN FK (trin 10 tilføjer)
    16	  node_id uuid not null references core_identity.org_nodes(id) on delete restrict,
    17	  effective_from date not null,
    18	  effective_to date,
    19	  applied_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    20	  created_by_pending_change_id uuid references core_identity.pending_changes(id) on delete set null,
    21	  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    22	  updated_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    23	  check (effective_to is null or effective_from < effective_to)
    24	);
    25	
    26	comment on table core_identity.client_node_placements is
    27	  'T9 Step 5 V6 Valg 4: versioneret klient-team-tilknytning. client_id UDEN FK (trin 10 tilføjer). Kun team-knuder kan modtage tilknytning (BEFORE-trigger validerer).';
    28	
    29	create unique index client_node_placements_open_per_client
    30	  on core_identity.client_node_placements (client_id)
    31	  where effective_to is null;
    32	
    33	alter table core_identity.client_node_placements
    34	  add constraint client_node_placements_no_overlap
    35	  exclude using gist (
    36	    client_id with =,
    37	    daterange(effective_from, coalesce(effective_to, 'infinity'::date), '[)') with &&
    38	  );
    39	
    40	create index client_node_placements_node_id on core_identity.client_node_placements (node_id);
    41	create index client_node_placements_effective on core_identity.client_node_placements (effective_from, effective_to);
    42	
    43	alter table core_identity.client_node_placements enable row level security;
    44	alter table core_identity.client_node_placements force row level security;
    45	
    46	revoke all on table core_identity.client_node_placements from public, anon, service_role;
    47	grant select on table core_identity.client_node_placements to authenticated;
    48	
    49	-- Pre-cutover SELECT-policy: kun is_admin(). Udvides i trin 10 efter clients eksisterer.
    50	create policy client_node_placements_select on core_identity.client_node_placements
    51	  for select to authenticated using (core_identity.is_admin());
    52	
    53	create trigger client_node_placements_audit
    54	  after insert or update or delete on core_identity.client_node_placements
    55	  for each row execute function core_compliance.stork_audit();
    56	
    57	-- ─── Team-only validering ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    58	create or replace function core_identity._client_placement_team_check()
    59	returns trigger
    60	language plpgsql
    61	security invoker
    62	set search_path = ''
    63	as $$
    64	begin
    65	  -- Verificér at node_id refererer til team-knude (current version).
    66	  if not exists (
    67	    select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions
    68	    where node_id = new.node_id
    69	      and node_type = 'team'
    70	      and effective_from <= new.effective_from
    71	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > new.effective_from)
    72	  ) then
    73	    raise exception 'client_placement_node_not_team: % er ikke team-knude på effective_from %', new.node_id, new.effective_from
    74	      using errcode = 'P0001';
    75	  end if;
    76	
    77	  return new;
    78	end;
    79	$$;
    80	
    81	create trigger client_node_placements_team_only
    82	  before insert or update on core_identity.client_node_placements
    83	  for each row execute function core_identity._client_placement_team_check();
    84	
    85	-- ─── Apply-handlers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    86	create or replace function core_identity._apply_client_place(
    87	  p_payload jsonb,
    88	  p_pending_change_id uuid
    89	) returns void
    90	language plpgsql
    91	security definer
    92	set search_path = ''
    93	as $$
    94	declare
    95	  v_client_id uuid;
    96	  v_node_id uuid;
    97	  v_effective_from date;
    98	begin
    99	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   100	  v_node_id := (p_payload->>'node_id')::uuid;
   101	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   102	
   103	  if v_client_id is null or v_node_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   104	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + node_id + effective_from required'
   105	      using errcode = '22023';
   106	  end if;
   107	
   108	  -- Luk eventuel åben placement (flyt).
   109	  update core_identity.client_node_placements
   110	  set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   111	  where client_id = v_client_id and effective_to is null;
   112	
   113	  -- Åbn ny placement (trigger validerer team-only).
   114	  insert into core_identity.client_node_placements
   115	    (client_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   116	  values
   117	    (v_client_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from, null, p_pending_change_id);
   118	end;
   119	$$;
   120	
   121	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_place(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   122	
   123	create or replace function core_identity._apply_client_close(
   124	  p_payload jsonb,
   125	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   126	) returns void
   127	language plpgsql
   128	security definer
   129	set search_path = ''
   130	as $$
   131	declare
   132	  v_client_id uuid;
   133	  v_effective_from date;
   134	begin
   135	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   136	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   137	
   138	  if v_client_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   139	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + effective_from required'
   140	      using errcode = '22023';
   141	  end if;
   142	
   143	  update core_identity.client_node_placements
   144	  set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   145	  where client_id = v_client_id and effective_to is null;
   146	end;
   147	$$;
   148	
   149	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_close(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   150	
   151	-- ─── CREATE OR REPLACE pending_change_apply: tilføj 2 cases ─────────────
   152	create or replace function core_identity.pending_change_apply(
   153	  p_change_id uuid
   154	) returns void
   155	language plpgsql
   156	security definer
   157	set search_path = ''
   158	as $$
   159	declare
   160	  v_change record;
   161	begin
   162	  select * into v_change
   163	  from core_identity.pending_changes
   164	  where id = p_change_id
   165	  for update;
   166	
   167	  if not found then
   168	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_found %', p_change_id
   169	      using errcode = 'P0002';
   170	  end if;
   171	
   172	  if v_change.status <> 'approved' then
   173	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_approved: status=%', v_change.status
   174	      using errcode = '22023';
   175	  end if;
   176	
   177	  if v_change.undo_deadline > now() then
   178	    raise exception 'not_yet_due'
   179	      using errcode = '22023',
   180	            hint = format('undo_deadline=%s, now=%s', v_change.undo_deadline, now());
   181	  end if;
   182	
   183	  if v_change.effective_from > current_date then
   184	    raise exception 'not_yet_due'
   185	      using errcode = '22023',
   186	            hint = format('effective_from=%s, current_date=%s', v_change.effective_from, current_date);
   187	  end if;
   188	
   189	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   190	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'pending_change_apply', true);
   191	
   192	  case v_change.change_type
   193	    when 'org_node_upsert' then
   194	      perform core_identity._apply_org_node_upsert(v_change.payload, p_change_id);
   195	    when 'org_node_deactivate' then
   196	      perform core_identity._apply_org_node_deactivate(v_change.payload, p_change_id);
   197	    when 'employee_place' then
   198	      perform core_identity._apply_employee_place(v_change.payload, p_change_id);
   199	    when 'employee_remove' then
   200	      perform core_identity._apply_employee_remove(v_change.payload, p_change_id);
   201	    when 'team_close' then
   202	      perform core_identity._apply_team_close(v_change.payload, p_change_id);
   203	    when 'client_place' then
   204	      perform core_identity._apply_client_place(v_change.payload, p_change_id);
   205	    when 'client_close' then
   206	      perform core_identity._apply_client_close(v_change.payload, p_change_id);
   207	    else
   208	      raise exception 'unknown_change_type: %', v_change.change_type
   209	        using errcode = '42883';
   210	  end case;
   211	
   212	  update core_identity.pending_changes
   213	  set status = 'applied',
   214	      applied_at = now(),
   215	      updated_at = now()
   216	  where id = p_change_id;
   217	end;
   218	$$;
   219	
   220	revoke execute on function core_identity.pending_change_apply(uuid) from public, anon;
   221	
   222	-- ─── Seed undo_settings ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
   223	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
   224	select set_config('stork.change_reason', 'T9 Step 5: seed undo_settings for client_place/close', false);
   225	
   226	insert into core_identity.undo_settings (change_type, undo_period_seconds)
   227	values
   228	  ('client_place', 24 * 3600),
   229	  ('client_close', 24 * 3600)
   230	on conflict (change_type) do nothing;
