/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260518000010_t9_seed_owners.sql | sed -n '1,110p' && nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260520000000_t9_supplement.sql | sed -n '1,120p' && nl -ba supabase/migrations/20260520000000_t9_supplement.sql | sed -n '180,240p'" in /home/mathias/stork-2.0
 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 9 / §4 trin 9 Step 12: Seed Cph Sales + Ejere + Mathias/Kasper + superadmin-grants.
     2	--
     3	-- Plan V6 Valg 12 (V5-sweep): identity + version pair-pattern.
     4	-- mathias-afgoerelser pkt 1+18 + krav-dok 3.3.4: Mathias + Kasper på "Ejere"-afdeling.
     5	-- Eneste konkrete navne i krav-dokumentet (bootstrap, ikke fri valg).
     6	
     7	-- ─── FIX: has_permission record-syntaks-bug fra Step 11 (000009) ───────
     8	-- Step 11 deklarerede `v_grant record` og brugte `SELECT INTO v_grant.field`
     9	-- — Postgres tillader ikke INTO af individuelle record-felter før recorden
    10	-- som helhed er assigned. Manifesterede sig først ved DB-test af has_permission
    11	-- (record "v_grant" is not assigned yet, sqlstate 55000).
    12	--
    13	-- Step 11 er applied; immutability gælder. Fix via CREATE OR REPLACE her
    14	-- med individuelle bool-variabler i stedet for record.
    15	create or replace function core_identity.has_permission(
    16	  p_page_key text,
    17	  p_tab_key text default null,
    18	  p_can_edit boolean default false
    19	) returns boolean
    20	language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
    21	as $hp$
    22	declare
    23	  v_employee_id uuid;
    24	  v_role_id uuid;
    25	  v_can_access boolean;
    26	  v_can_write boolean;
    27	begin
    28	  v_employee_id := core_identity.current_employee_id();
    29	  if v_employee_id is null then return false; end if;
    30	
    31	  select role_id into v_role_id from core_identity.employees where id = v_employee_id;
    32	  if v_role_id is null then return false; end if;
    33	
    34	  -- Ny model: resolve via grants (tab → page → area).
    35	  if p_tab_key is not null then
    36	    select g.can_access, g.can_write into v_can_access, v_can_write
    37	    from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
    38	    join core_identity.permission_tabs t on t.id = g.tab_id
    39	    join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = t.page_id
    40	    where g.role_id = v_role_id
    41	      and p.name = p_page_key
    42	      and t.name = p_tab_key
    43	    limit 1;
    44	    if found then
    45	      return v_can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_can_write);
    46	    end if;
    47	  end if;
    48	
    49	  -- Fald tilbage til page-niveau.
    50	  select g.can_access, g.can_write into v_can_access, v_can_write
    51	  from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
    52	  join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = g.page_id
    53	  where g.role_id = v_role_id and p.name = p_page_key
    54	  limit 1;
    55	  if found then
    56	    return v_can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_can_write);
    57	  end if;
    58	
    59	  -- Fald tilbage til area-niveau (via page-name → area).
    60	  select g.can_access, g.can_write into v_can_access, v_can_write
    61	  from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
    62	  join core_identity.permission_areas a on a.id = g.area_id
    63	  join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.area_id = a.id
    64	  where g.role_id = v_role_id and p.name = p_page_key
    65	  limit 1;
    66	  if found then
    67	    return v_can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_can_write);
    68	  end if;
    69	
    70	  -- Fallback til legacy role_page_permissions.
    71	  select can_view, can_edit into v_can_access, v_can_write
    72	  from core_identity.role_page_permissions
    73	  where role_id = v_role_id
    74	    and page_key = p_page_key
    75	    and (p_tab_key is null or tab_key = p_tab_key or tab_key is null)
    76	  order by case when tab_key = p_tab_key then 1 else 2 end
    77	  limit 1;
    78	
    79	  if found then
    80	    return v_can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_can_write);
    81	  end if;
    82	
    83	  return false;
    84	end;
    85	$hp$;
    86	
    87	-- ─── FIX: closure-rebuild CTE-bug fra Step 3 (000002) ──────────────────
    88	-- Step 3's rekursive CTE havde `join n.node_id = ac.descendant_id` (linje 71)
    89	-- i stedet for `ac.ancestor_id`. Det fik recursion til at gen-besøge samme
    90	-- (parent, child)-relation på alle depths 1..100 i stedet for at gå op til
    91	-- bedsteforælderen. PK = (ancestor_id, descendant_id) → duplicate-key
    92	-- violation ved første ægte INSERT (her i seed_owners).
    93	--
    94	-- Step 3 er applied; immutability gælder. Fix via CREATE OR REPLACE her
    95	-- (PRE-seeds så closure-trigger har korrekt logik når seeds INSERT'er).
    96	create or replace function core_identity._org_node_closure_rebuild()
    97	returns void
    98	language plpgsql
    99	security definer
   100	set search_path = ''
   101	as $fix$
   102	begin
   103	  delete from core_identity.org_node_closure;
   104	
   105	  with recursive nodes_now as (
   106	    select distinct on (node_id) node_id, parent_id
   107	    from core_identity.org_node_versions
   108	    where effective_from <= current_date
   109	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > current_date)
   110	    order by node_id, effective_from desc
     1	-- T9-supplement (2026-05-20).
     2	--
     3	-- Append-only supplement-migration der lukker de 6 åbne T9-fund:
     4	--   Section A — Team-no-children trigger med to-vejs interval-overlap (Step 1)
     5	--   Section B — Backdated traversal i 7 apply-handlers (Step 2)
     6	--   Section C1 — Date-aware ACL-helpers (Step 3a)
     7	--   Section C2 — Udvidet SELECT-policy på client_node_placements (Step 3b)
     8	--   Section C3 — 9 read-RPCs med session-var + _require_read_permission (Step 3c)
     9	--   Section D — Step 12 robusthed DO-block (Step 4)
    10	--
    11	-- Reference: docs/coordination/T9-supplement-plan.md (V4, godkendt af Codex + Claude.ai)
    12	-- Reference: docs/coordination/T9-supplement-krav-og-data.md (Mathias-godkendt)
    13	
    14	-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    15	-- SECTION A — Team-no-children-trigger med to-vejs interval-overlap (Step 1)
    16	-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    17	-- Codex V2 KRITISK 2 fix. Tidligere trigger validerede kun NEW.effective_from-
    18	-- punkt; backdated/future cases kunne snige sig forbi. Nu: daterange-overlap.
    19	--
    20	-- Invariant a: når NEW.parent_id sættes må child-intervallet ikke overlappe
    21	--              nogen parent-version hvor node_type = 'team'.
    22	-- Invariant b: når NEW.node_type = 'team' må team-intervallet ikke overlappe
    23	--              nogen child-version hvor parent_id = NEW.node_id.
    24	
    25	create or replace function core_identity._org_node_team_no_children_check()
    26	returns trigger
    27	language plpgsql
    28	security invoker
    29	set search_path = ''
    30	as $$
    31	declare
    32	  v_new_range daterange;
    33	begin
    34	  v_new_range := daterange(new.effective_from, coalesce(new.effective_to, 'infinity'::date), '[)');
    35	
    36	  -- Invariant a: parent må ikke have team-version der overlapper NEW's interval.
    37	  if new.parent_id is not null then
    38	    if exists (
    39	      select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions p
    40	      where p.node_id = new.parent_id
    41	        and p.node_type = 'team'
    42	        and daterange(p.effective_from, coalesce(p.effective_to, 'infinity'::date), '[)') && v_new_range
    43	    ) then
    44	      raise exception 'org_node_team_cannot_have_children: parent % har team-version der overlapper [%, %)', new.parent_id, new.effective_from, coalesce(new.effective_to::text, 'infinity')
    45	        using errcode = 'P0001';
    46	    end if;
    47	  end if;
    48	
    49	  -- Invariant b: hvis NEW er team, må ingen child-version overlappe NEW's interval.
    50	  if new.node_type = 'team' then
    51	    if exists (
    52	      select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions c
    53	      where c.parent_id = new.node_id
    54	        and (tg_op = 'INSERT' or c.version_id <> new.version_id)
    55	        and daterange(c.effective_from, coalesce(c.effective_to, 'infinity'::date), '[)') && v_new_range
    56	    ) then
    57	      raise exception 'org_node_team_cannot_have_children: node % har child-version der overlapper [%, %)', new.node_id, new.effective_from, coalesce(new.effective_to::text, 'infinity')
    58	        using errcode = 'P0001';
    59	    end if;
    60	  end if;
    61	
    62	  return new;
    63	end;
    64	$$;
    65	
    66	comment on function core_identity._org_node_team_no_children_check() is
    67	  'T9-supplement Step 1 (Codex V2 KRITISK 2): to-vejs interval-overlap-invariant. (a) child må ikke overlappe team-parent-version. (b) team-node må ikke overlappe child-version.';
    68	
    69	-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    70	-- SECTION C1 — Date-aware ACL-helpers (Step 3a)
    71	-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
    72	-- Codex V2 KRITISK 1 fix. Tidligere helpers brugte current_date hardkodet —
    73	-- _at(p_date)-RPCs fik forkert ACL. Nu: helpers tager p_date som parameter;
    74	-- current-wrappers kalder med current_date.
    75	--
    76	-- IKKE baseret på org_node_closure (current-state-only). Helpers bygger over
    77	-- org_node_versions + employee_node_placements effective på p_date.
    78	
    79	create or replace function core_identity.acl_subtree_org_nodes_at(
    80	  p_employee_id uuid,
    81	  p_date date
    82	) returns uuid[]
    83	language sql
    84	stable
    85	security invoker
    86	set search_path = ''
    87	as $$
    88	  with recursive
    89	  placement_node as (
    90	    -- Hvor er employee placeret på p_date?
    91	    select p.node_id
    92	    from core_identity.employee_node_placements p
    93	    where p.employee_id = p_employee_id
    94	      and p.effective_from <= p_date
    95	      and (p.effective_to is null or p.effective_to > p_date)
    96	    limit 1
    97	  ),
    98	  subtree as (
    99	    -- Start fra placement-node.
   100	    select pn.node_id, 0 as depth
   101	    from placement_node pn
   102	    union all
   103	    -- Walk children via version effective på p_date.
   104	    select v.node_id, s.depth + 1
   105	    from subtree s
   106	    join core_identity.org_node_versions v on v.parent_id = s.node_id
   107	    where v.effective_from <= p_date
   108	      and (v.effective_to is null or v.effective_to > p_date)
   109	      and s.depth < 100
   110	  )
   111	  select coalesce(array_agg(distinct node_id), '{}'::uuid[]) from subtree;
   112	$$;
   113	
   114	comment on function core_identity.acl_subtree_org_nodes_at(uuid, date) is
   115	  'T9-supplement Step 3a (Codex V2 KRITISK 1): date-aware subtree-resolution baseret på org_node_versions + placements effective på p_date.';
   116	
   117	create or replace function core_identity.acl_subtree_employees_at(
   118	  p_employee_id uuid,
   119	  p_date date
   120	) returns uuid[]
   180	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: employee_id + node_id + effective_from required'
   181	      using errcode = '22023';
   182	  end if;
   183	
   184	  -- Verificér at node_id er IS_ACTIVE knude på v_effective_from.
   185	  if not exists (
   186	    select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions
   187	    where node_id = v_node_id
   188	      and is_active = true
   189	      and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   190	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   191	  ) then
   192	    raise exception 'inactive_or_missing_node: %', v_node_id
   193	      using errcode = 'P0002';
   194	  end if;
   195	
   196	  -- Find aktivt interval på v_effective_from for denne employee.
   197	  select * into v_active
   198	  from core_identity.employee_node_placements
   199	  where employee_id = v_employee_id
   200	    and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   201	    and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   202	  limit 1;
   203	
   204	  if not found then
   205	    -- Pre-history: INSERT ny med effective_to = tidligst efterfølgende interval (eller null).
   206	    insert into core_identity.employee_node_placements
   207	      (employee_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   208	    select v_employee_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from,
   209	      (select min(effective_from) from core_identity.employee_node_placements
   210	       where employee_id = v_employee_id and effective_from > v_effective_from),
   211	      p_pending_change_id;
   212	  elsif v_active.effective_from = v_effective_from then
   213	    -- Exact-start: UPDATE existing (undgår zero-length).
   214	    update core_identity.employee_node_placements
   215	    set node_id = v_node_id,
   216	        created_by_pending_change_id = coalesce(p_pending_change_id, created_by_pending_change_id),
   217	        updated_at = now()
   218	    where id = v_active.id;
   219	  else
   220	    -- Split: luk active, INSERT ny [v_effective_from, active.effective_to).
   221	    update core_identity.employee_node_placements
   222	    set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   223	    where id = v_active.id;
   224	
   225	    insert into core_identity.employee_node_placements
   226	      (employee_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   227	    values
   228	      (v_employee_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from, v_active.effective_to, p_pending_change_id);
   229	  end if;
   230	end;
   231	$$;
   232	
   233	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_employee_place(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   234	
   235	-- ─── _apply_employee_remove (close-handler — placement-tabel) ─────────────
   236	create or replace function core_identity._apply_employee_remove(
   237	  p_payload jsonb,
   238	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   239	) returns void
   240	language plpgsql

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- Trin 2 / §4 trin 5: Identitet del 1 — superadmin-floor.
     2	--
     3	-- Master-plan §1.7: "BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE-trigger på employees.role_id og på
     4	-- role_page_permissions for admin-permission-rækker. Konfig-tabel definerer
     5	-- minimum N (default: 2) medarbejdere der bevarer admin-permission."
     6	--
     7	-- Mekanik: AFTER-trigger på employees + role_page_permissions tjekker antal
     8	-- aktive admins efter mutation. Hvis under floor → RAISE og rul transaktion
     9	-- tilbage.
    10	--
    11	-- Admin defineres som medarbejder hvis rolle har permission
    12	-- (page_key='system', tab_key='manage', scope='all', can_edit=true).
    13	
    14	-- ─── superadmin_settings (singleton-konfig) ──────────────────────────────
    15	-- no-dedup-key: singleton-config-tabel; én row med id=1.
    16	create table core_compliance.superadmin_settings (
    17	  id integer primary key check (id = 1),
    18	  min_admin_count integer not null default 2 check (min_admin_count >= 1),
    19	  created_at timestamptz not null default now(),
    20	  updated_at timestamptz not null default now()
    21	);
    22	
    23	comment on table core_compliance.superadmin_settings is
    24	  'Master-plan §1.7 superadmin-floor-konfig. Singleton (id=1). UI-redigerbar.';
    25	
    26	-- Top-level set_config så fitness ser session-vars uden at strippe dollar-quotes.
    27	select set_config('stork.source_type', 'migration', false);
    28	select set_config('stork.change_reason', 'legacy_import_t0: t2 superadmin_settings singleton bootstrap', false);
    29	
    30	insert into core_compliance.superadmin_settings (id, min_admin_count) values (1, 2);
    31	
    32	alter table core_compliance.superadmin_settings enable row level security;
    33	alter table core_compliance.superadmin_settings force row level security;
    34	revoke all on table core_compliance.superadmin_settings from public, anon, service_role;
    35	grant select on table core_compliance.superadmin_settings to authenticated;
    36	
    37	create policy superadmin_settings_select on core_compliance.superadmin_settings
    38	  for select to authenticated using (true);
    39	
    40	create policy superadmin_settings_update on core_compliance.superadmin_settings
    41	  for update to authenticated
    42	  using (current_setting('stork.allow_superadmin_settings_write', true) = 'true')
    43	  with check (current_setting('stork.allow_superadmin_settings_write', true) = 'true');
    44	
    45	grant update on table core_compliance.superadmin_settings to authenticated;
    46	
    47	create trigger superadmin_settings_set_updated_at
    48	  before update on core_compliance.superadmin_settings
    49	  for each row execute function core_compliance.set_updated_at();
    50	
    51	create trigger superadmin_settings_audit
    52	  after update on core_compliance.superadmin_settings
    53	  for each row execute function core_compliance.stork_audit();
    54	
    55	-- ─── enforce_admin_floor() — fælles helper-funktion ──────────────────────
    56	create or replace function core_identity.enforce_admin_floor()
    57	returns trigger
    58	language plpgsql
    59	security definer
    60	set search_path = ''
    61	as $$
    62	declare
    63	  v_active_admins integer;
    64	  v_min_admins integer;
    65	begin
    66	  select min_admin_count into v_min_admins
    67	    from core_compliance.superadmin_settings where id = 1;
    68	
    69	  select count(*) into v_active_admins
    70	    from core_identity.employees e
    71	    join core_identity.role_page_permissions p on p.role_id = e.role_id
    72	   where e.anonymized_at is null
    73	     and p.page_key = 'system'
    74	     and p.tab_key = 'manage'
    75	     and p.scope = 'all'
    76	     and p.can_edit = true;
    77	
    78	  if v_active_admins < v_min_admins then
    79	    raise exception 'superadmin-floor overtrådt: % aktive admins er under minimum %', v_active_admins, v_min_admins
    80	      using errcode = 'P0001',
    81	            hint = 'Mindst ' || v_min_admins || ' admin-medarbejdere skal bevares. Tilføj ny admin før denne ændring.';
    82	  end if;
    83	
    84	  return null;  -- AFTER-trigger
    85	end;
    86	$$;
    87	
    88	comment on function core_identity.enforce_admin_floor() is
    89	  'AFTER-trigger der validerer at antal aktive admins er ≥ superadmin_settings.min_admin_count. Anvendes på employees og role_page_permissions.';
    90	
    91	-- ─── Trigger på employees: enforce ved UPDATE af role_id eller anonymized_at, og ved DELETE ──
    92	create trigger employees_enforce_admin_floor
    93	  after update of role_id, anonymized_at or delete on core_identity.employees
    94	  for each row execute function core_identity.enforce_admin_floor();
    95	
    96	-- ─── Trigger på role_page_permissions: enforce ved ALL mutations ─────────
    97	-- Permission-ændring kan reducere admins (eks. ændre scope fra 'all' til 'team').
    98	create trigger role_page_permissions_enforce_admin_floor
    99	  after update or delete on core_identity.role_page_permissions
   100	  for each row execute function core_identity.enforce_admin_floor();
   101	
   102	-- ─── Trigger på roles: enforce ved DELETE (kan fjerne admin-rolle helt) ──
   103	create trigger roles_enforce_admin_floor
   104	  after delete on core_identity.roles
   105	  for each row execute function core_identity.enforce_admin_floor();

 succeeded in 0ms:
     1	-- T9 Fundament-supplement (2026-05-18).
     2	--
     3	-- IMPLEMENTERER §1.1's session-var-pattern på T9-write-veje:
     4	--   "Hver mutation-RPC sætter session-variabel der signalerer 'denne RPC har
     5	--    autoriseret skrivning'; INSERT/UPDATE-policies kræver variablen sat"
     6	--
     7	-- T9 byggede write-RPCs som SECURITY INVOKER (korrekt per §1.1) men droppede
     8	-- session-var-pattern + write-policies. Konsekvens: write-RPCs fejler under
     9	-- FORCE RLS når authenticated kalder dem. Pre-T9 fulgte mønsteret (R1B's
    10	-- stork.allow_roles_write, P1a's stork.bootstrap_activation, osv.).
    11	--
    12	-- Reference: docs/coordination/mathias-afgoerelser.md (2026-05-18 entry)
    13	-- + master-plan §1.7 update (samme PR).
    14	--
    15	-- Scope (eksplicit Mathias-bekræftet):
    16	-- - 6 write-tabeller får INSERT + UPDATE policies med t9_write_authorized-check
    17	-- - 11 write-RPCs får perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)
    18	--   EFTER has_permission-check (defense-in-depth: permission FØR write-autorisation)
    19	--
    20	-- IKKE i denne PR (senere supplement-PR):
    21	-- - KRITISK 1 Team-retype trigger-fix
    22	-- - KRITISK 4 Backdated effective_from guards på 5 apply-handlers
    23	-- - KRITISK 3 API/schema exposure (kræver Mathias Dashboard-handling)
    24	-- - Type-codegen, Read-RPC gates, Step 12 superadmin-robusthed
    25	
    26	-- ─── DEL 0: GRANT INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE på 6 write-tabeller ────────────────
    27	--
    28	-- Codex runde 3 fund 1: RLS policy er ortogonal til SQL-privileges. T9
    29	-- migrations gjorde `revoke all` + `grant select to authenticated`. Uden
    30	-- explicit INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE-grant vil RPC-write fejle MED "permission
    31	-- denied for table" FØR session-var-policy kan evaluere. Pre-T9 (R1B, P1a)
    32	-- fulgte begge mønstre konsekvent.
    33	
    34	grant insert, update on table core_identity.pending_changes to authenticated;
    35	grant insert, update on table core_identity.undo_settings to authenticated;
    36	grant insert, update on table core_identity.permission_areas to authenticated;
    37	grant insert, update on table core_identity.permission_pages to authenticated;
    38	grant insert, update on table core_identity.permission_tabs to authenticated;
    39	grant insert, update, delete on table core_identity.role_permission_grants to authenticated;
    40	
    41	-- ─── DEL 1: Policies på 6 write-tabeller ──────────────────────────────────
    42	--
    43	-- Pattern: INSERT-policy med WITH CHECK + UPDATE-policy med USING.
    44	-- Begge kræver current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true'.
    45	-- Tredje arg til current_setting('...', true) returnerer NULL hvis var ikke
    46	-- er sat — koalescerer til false i bool-sammenligning.
    47	
    48	-- 1.1 pending_changes
    49	create policy pending_changes_insert on core_identity.pending_changes
    50	  for insert to authenticated
    51	  with check (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
    52	
    53	create policy pending_changes_update on core_identity.pending_changes
    54	  for update to authenticated
    55	  using (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
    56	
    57	-- Codex runde 3 fund 2: SELECT-policy fra Step 1 (Step 1's body linje 87-93)
    58	-- tillod kun requester + is_admin() at se pending rows. Det blokerer
    59	-- pending_change_approve/undo's dispatcher (select * ... for update køres
    60	-- FØR dispatcher kan evaluere has_permission). Erstat med policy der også
    61	-- tillader potentielle approvere/undoere baseret på samme change_type →
    62	-- page_key-mapping som dispatcheren bruger. Holder §1.1: policy er
    63	-- write-uafhængig; dispatcher gates'er write som sandhed.
    64	drop policy if exists pending_changes_select on core_identity.pending_changes;
    65	
    66	create policy pending_changes_select on core_identity.pending_changes
    67	  for select to authenticated
    68	  using (
    69	    requested_by = core_identity.current_employee_id()
    70	    or core_identity.is_admin()
    71	    or (
    72	      change_type in ('org_node_upsert', 'org_node_deactivate', 'team_close')
    73	        and core_identity.has_permission('org_nodes', null, true)
    74	    )
    75	    or (
    76	      change_type in ('employee_place', 'employee_remove')
    77	        and core_identity.has_permission('employee_placements', null, true)
    78	    )
    79	    or (
    80	      change_type in ('client_place', 'client_close')
    81	        and core_identity.has_permission('client_placements', null, true)
    82	    )
    83	  );
    84	
    85	-- 1.2 undo_settings
    86	create policy undo_settings_insert on core_identity.undo_settings
    87	  for insert to authenticated
    88	  with check (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
    89	
    90	create policy undo_settings_update on core_identity.undo_settings
    91	  for update to authenticated
    92	  using (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
    93	
    94	-- 1.3 permission_areas
    95	create policy permission_areas_insert on core_identity.permission_areas
    96	  for insert to authenticated
    97	  with check (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
    98	
    99	create policy permission_areas_update on core_identity.permission_areas
   100	  for update to authenticated
   101	  using (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
   102	
   103	-- 1.4 permission_pages
   104	create policy permission_pages_insert on core_identity.permission_pages
   105	  for insert to authenticated
   106	  with check (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
   107	
   108	create policy permission_pages_update on core_identity.permission_pages
   109	  for update to authenticated
   110	  using (current_setting('stork.t9_write_authorized', true) = 'true');
   150	-- Mathias 2026-05-19 (T9-omstart-rammen punkt 12): Approve er ikke ny adgang.
   151	-- Den er can_edit på den ressource som pending change rammer. Hvis bruger har
   152	-- can_edit=true på org_træ-area, må vedkommende også approve en pending change
   153	-- der ændrer org_træ.
   154	--
   155	-- Dispatcher-mapping change_type → has_permission(page_key, can_edit=true):
   156	--   org_node_upsert     → 'org_nodes'           (struktur-ændring af knude)
   157	--   org_node_deactivate → 'org_nodes'           (struktur-ændring af knude)
   158	--   team_close          → 'org_nodes'           (lukker team-knude — struktur)
   159	--   employee_place      → 'employee_placements' (medarbejder-placering)
   160	--   employee_remove     → 'employee_placements' (medarbejder-placering)
   161	--   client_place        → 'client_placements'   (klient-placering)
   162	--   client_close        → 'client_placements'   (klient-placering)
   163	--
   164	-- Mappingen er system-mekanik (kode-logik), IKKE UI-styret data. Samme princip
   165	-- som apply-handlers' dispatcher per change_type. Mappingen er udtømmende;
   166	-- ukendt change_type raiser exception.
   167	--
   168	-- is_admin() self-approve-undtagelsen bevares: en admin kan approve sin egen
   169	-- request (§1.1's undtagelse for bootstrap-flows).
   170	create or replace function core_identity.pending_change_approve(
   171	  p_change_id uuid
   172	) returns void
   173	language plpgsql
   174	security invoker
   175	set search_path = ''
   176	as $$
   177	declare
   178	  v_change record;
   179	  v_approver uuid;
   180	  v_undo_period integer;
   181	  v_page_key text;
   182	begin
   183	  v_approver := core_identity.current_employee_id();
   184	  if v_approver is null then
   185	    raise exception 'no_authenticated_employee'
   186	      using errcode = '42501';
   187	  end if;
   188	
   189	  select * into v_change
   190	  from core_identity.pending_changes
   191	  where id = p_change_id
   192	  for update;
   193	
   194	  if not found then
   195	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_found %', p_change_id
   196	      using errcode = 'P0002';
   197	  end if;
   198	
   199	  if v_change.status <> 'pending' then
   200	    raise exception 'pending_change_wrong_status: % (expected pending)', v_change.status
   201	      using errcode = '22023';
   202	  end if;
   203	
   204	  -- Dispatcher: map change_type → underliggende ressource (page_key).
   205	  -- Approve af pending change kræver can_edit på samme page som ændringen rammer.
   206	  case v_change.change_type
   207	    when 'org_node_upsert'     then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   208	    when 'org_node_deactivate' then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   209	    when 'team_close'          then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   210	    when 'employee_place'      then v_page_key := 'employee_placements';
   211	    when 'employee_remove'     then v_page_key := 'employee_placements';
   212	    when 'client_place'        then v_page_key := 'client_placements';
   213	    when 'client_close'        then v_page_key := 'client_placements';
   214	    else
   215	      raise exception 'unknown_change_type for approve-gate: %', v_change.change_type
   216	        using errcode = '42883';
   217	  end case;
   218	
   219	  if not core_identity.has_permission(v_page_key, null, true) then
   220	    raise exception 'permission_denied: approve % kræver can_edit på %', v_change.change_type, v_page_key
   221	      using errcode = '42501';
   222	  end if;
   223	
   224	  if v_change.requested_by = v_approver and not core_identity.is_admin() then
   225	    raise exception 'pending_change_self_approve_forbidden'
   226	      using errcode = '42501', hint = 'requester må ikke selv approve (medmindre admin)';
   227	  end if;
   228	
   229	  select undo_period_seconds into v_undo_period
   230	  from core_identity.undo_settings
   231	  where change_type = v_change.change_type;
   232	
   233	  if v_undo_period is null then
   234	    v_undo_period := 24 * 3600;
   235	  end if;
   236	
   237	  perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
   238	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   239	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'pending_change_approve', true);
   240	
   241	  update core_identity.pending_changes
   242	  set status = 'approved',
   243	      approved_by = v_approver,
   244	      approved_at = now(),
   245	      undo_deadline = now() + (v_undo_period || ' seconds')::interval,
   246	      updated_at = now()
   247	  where id = p_change_id;
   248	end;
   249	$$;
   250	revoke execute on function core_identity.pending_change_approve(uuid) from public, anon;
   251	
   252	-- 2.2 pending_change_undo (Step 1, UPDATE pending_changes)
   253	--
   254	-- Undo af pending change kræver samme can_edit-rettighed på underliggende
   255	-- ressource som approve af samme change. Dispatcher-mapping identisk med
   256	-- pending_change_approve.
   257	create or replace function core_identity.pending_change_undo(
   258	  p_change_id uuid
   259	) returns void
   260	language plpgsql
   261	security invoker
   262	set search_path = ''
   263	as $$
   264	declare
   265	  v_change record;
   266	  v_page_key text;
   267	begin
   268	  select * into v_change
   269	  from core_identity.pending_changes
   270	  where id = p_change_id
   271	  for update;
   272	
   273	  if not found then
   274	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_found %', p_change_id
   275	      using errcode = 'P0002';
   276	  end if;
   277	
   278	  if v_change.status <> 'approved' then
   279	    raise exception 'pending_change_wrong_status: % (expected approved)', v_change.status
   280	      using errcode = '22023';
   281	  end if;
   282	
   283	  if v_change.undo_deadline <= now() then
   284	    raise exception 'undo_deadline_expired'
   285	      using errcode = '22023',
   286	            hint = format('deadline var %s', v_change.undo_deadline);
   287	  end if;
   288	
   289	  -- Dispatcher: samme mapping som pending_change_approve.
   290	  case v_change.change_type
   291	    when 'org_node_upsert'     then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   292	    when 'org_node_deactivate' then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   293	    when 'team_close'          then v_page_key := 'org_nodes';
   294	    when 'employee_place'      then v_page_key := 'employee_placements';
   295	    when 'employee_remove'     then v_page_key := 'employee_placements';
   296	    when 'client_place'        then v_page_key := 'client_placements';
   297	    when 'client_close'        then v_page_key := 'client_placements';
   298	    else
   299	      raise exception 'unknown_change_type for undo-gate: %', v_change.change_type
   300	        using errcode = '42883';
   301	  end case;
   302	
   303	  if not core_identity.has_permission(v_page_key, null, true) then
   304	    raise exception 'permission_denied: undo % kræver can_edit på %', v_change.change_type, v_page_key
   305	      using errcode = '42501';
   306	  end if;
   307	
   308	  perform set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true);
   309	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   310	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'pending_change_undo', true);
   311	
   312	  update core_identity.pending_changes
   313	  set status = 'undone',
   314	      undone_at = now(),
   315	      updated_at = now()
   316	  where id = p_change_id;
   317	end;
   318	$$;
   319	revoke execute on function core_identity.pending_change_undo(uuid) from public, anon;

   230	  p_change_id uuid
   276	-- ─── RPC: pending_change_apply (CENTRAL APPLY-GATE — V6 Beslutning 15) ────
   277	-- V6 Codex KRITISK-fix: sikkerheds-grænsen for "ikke materialiser future-dated"
   278	-- sidder HER, ikke kun i cron-filter. ALLE apply-paths (cron, manuel admin, test)
   279	-- går gennem samme gate.
   280	create or replace function core_identity.pending_change_apply(
   281	  p_change_id uuid
   282	) returns void
   283	language plpgsql
   284	security definer
   285	set search_path = ''
   286	as $$
   287	declare
   288	  v_change record;
   289	begin
   290	  select * into v_change
   291	  from core_identity.pending_changes
   292	  where id = p_change_id
   293	  for update;
   294	
   295	  if not found then
   296	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_found %', p_change_id
   297	      using errcode = 'P0002';
   298	  end if;
   299	
   300	  -- V6 central apply-gate: due-check.
   301	  if v_change.status <> 'approved' then
   302	    raise exception 'pending_change_not_approved: status=%', v_change.status
   303	      using errcode = '22023';
   304	  end if;
   305	
   306	  if v_change.undo_deadline > now() then
   307	    raise exception 'not_yet_due'
   308	      using errcode = '22023',
   309	            hint = format('undo_deadline=%s, now=%s', v_change.undo_deadline, now());
   310	  end if;
   311	
   312	  if v_change.effective_from > current_date then
   313	    raise exception 'not_yet_due'
   314	      using errcode = '22023',
   315	            hint = format('effective_from=%s, current_date=%s', v_change.effective_from, current_date);
   316	  end if;
   317	
   318	  perform set_config('stork.source_type', 'manual', true);
   319	  perform set_config('stork.change_reason', 'pending_change_apply', true);
   320	
   321	  -- Dispatcher: switch på change_type til intern handler.
   322	  -- Steps 2+4+5 udvider via CREATE OR REPLACE af denne funktion med rigtige
   323	  -- CASE WHEN-handlers. I Step 1 er der ingen handlers, så vi raiser direkte.
   324	  raise exception 'unknown_change_type: %', v_change.change_type
   325	    using errcode = '42883',
   326	          hint = 'Step 1 dispatcher har ingen handlers; Steps 2+4+5 udvider via CREATE OR REPLACE';
   327	
   328	  -- Når Steps 2+4+5 udvider CASE: mark applied her efter handler returnerer.
   329	  update core_identity.pending_changes
   330	  set status = 'applied',
   331	      applied_at = now(),
   332	      updated_at = now()
   333	  where id = p_change_id;
   334	end;
   335	$$;
   336	
   337	comment on function core_identity.pending_change_apply(uuid) is
   338	  'T9 Step 1: CENTRAL APPLY-GATE. V6 Beslutning 15. Verificerer due-check (status=approved AND undo_deadline <= now() AND effective_from <= current_date). Hvis ikke: RAISE not_yet_due. Dispatcher til intern handler. Eksekveres af cron eller manuelt af admin; ALLE paths gennem samme gate.';
   339	
   340	revoke execute on function core_identity.pending_change_apply(uuid) from public, anon;

   139	-- ─── client_node_place (pending) ────────────────────────────────────────
   140	create or replace function core_identity.client_node_place(
   141	  p_client_id uuid,
   142	  p_node_id uuid,
   143	  p_effective_from date
   144	) returns uuid language plpgsql security definer set search_path = '' as $$
   145	declare v_request_id uuid;
   146	begin
   147	  if not core_identity.has_permission('client_placements', 'manage', true) then
   148	    raise exception 'permission_denied' using errcode = '42501';
   149	  end if;
   150	  -- Pre-check: node_id skal være team.

   153	    where node_id = p_node_id and node_type = 'team' and is_active = true
   154	      and effective_from <= current_date
   155	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > current_date)
   156	  ) then
   157	    raise exception 'client_placement_node_not_team_or_inactive: %', p_node_id using errcode = '22023';
   158	  end if;
   159	  v_request_id := core_identity.pending_change_request(
   160	    'client_place', p_client_id,
   161	    jsonb_build_object(
   162	      'client_id', p_client_id::text,
   163	      'node_id', p_node_id::text,
   164	      'effective_from', p_effective_from::text
   165	    ),
   166	    p_effective_from
   167	  );
   168	  return v_request_id;
   169	end; $$;

   141	
   142	-- ─── has_permission() opdateres med ny model + fallback ─────────────────
   143	-- Plan V6 Valg 11: helpers læser fra role_permission_grants med fallback til
   144	-- role_page_permissions (legacy read-only). Fallback fjernes når sidste
   145	-- konsument er migreret (G-nummer i Step 13).
   146	
   147	create or replace function core_identity.has_permission(
   148	  p_page_key text,
   149	  p_tab_key text default null,
   150	  p_can_edit boolean default false
   151	) returns boolean
   152	language plpgsql stable security invoker set search_path = ''
   153	as $$
   154	declare
   155	  v_employee_id uuid;
   156	  v_role_id uuid;
   157	  v_grant record;
   158	begin
   159	  v_employee_id := core_identity.current_employee_id();
   160	  if v_employee_id is null then return false; end if;
   161	
   162	  select role_id into v_role_id from core_identity.employees where id = v_employee_id;
   163	  if v_role_id is null then return false; end if;
   164	
   165	  -- Ny model: resolve via grants (tab → page → area).
   166	  if p_tab_key is not null then
   167	    select g.can_access, g.can_write into v_grant.can_access, v_grant.can_write
   168	    from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
   169	    join core_identity.permission_tabs t on t.id = g.tab_id
   170	    join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = t.page_id
   171	    where g.role_id = v_role_id
   172	      and p.name = p_page_key
   173	      and t.name = p_tab_key
   174	    limit 1;
   175	    if found then
   176	      return v_grant.can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_grant.can_write);
   177	    end if;
   178	  end if;
   179	
   180	  -- Fald tilbage til page-niveau.
   181	  select g.can_access, g.can_write into v_grant.can_access, v_grant.can_write
   182	  from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
   183	  join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.id = g.page_id
   184	  where g.role_id = v_role_id and p.name = p_page_key
   185	  limit 1;
   186	  if found then
   187	    return v_grant.can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_grant.can_write);
   188	  end if;
   189	
   190	  -- Fald tilbage til area-niveau (via page-name → area).
   191	  select g.can_access, g.can_write into v_grant.can_access, v_grant.can_write
   192	  from core_identity.role_permission_grants g
   193	  join core_identity.permission_areas a on a.id = g.area_id
   194	  join core_identity.permission_pages p on p.area_id = a.id
   195	  where g.role_id = v_role_id and p.name = p_page_key
   196	  limit 1;
   197	  if found then
   198	    return v_grant.can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_grant.can_write);
   199	  end if;
   200	
   201	  -- Fallback til legacy role_page_permissions (G-nummer for senere pakke-drop).
   202	  select can_view, can_edit into v_grant.can_access, v_grant.can_write
   203	  from core_identity.role_page_permissions
   204	  where role_id = v_role_id
   205	    and page_key = p_page_key
   206	    and (p_tab_key is null or tab_key = p_tab_key or tab_key is null)
   207	  order by case when tab_key = p_tab_key then 1 else 2 end
   208	  limit 1;
   209	
   210	  if found then
   211	    return v_grant.can_access and (not p_can_edit or v_grant.can_write);
   212	  end if;
   213	
   214	  return false;
   215	end;
   216	$$;
   217	
   218	comment on function core_identity.has_permission(text, text, boolean) is
   219	  'T9 Step 11 V6 Valg 11: opdateret med role_permission_grants som primær + fallback til legacy role_page_permissions. Fallback fjernes når alle konsumenter er migreret (G-nummer for senere pakke).';
   220

   282	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_employee_remove(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   283	
   284	-- ─── _apply_client_place (place-handler) ──────────────────────────────────
   285	create or replace function core_identity._apply_client_place(
   286	  p_payload jsonb,
   287	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   288	) returns void
   289	language plpgsql
   290	security definer
   291	set search_path = ''
   292	as $$
   293	declare
   294	  v_client_id uuid;
   295	  v_node_id uuid;
   296	  v_effective_from date;
   297	  v_active record;
   298	begin
   299	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   300	  v_node_id := (p_payload->>'node_id')::uuid;
   301	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   302	
   303	  if v_client_id is null or v_node_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   304	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + node_id + effective_from required'
   305	      using errcode = '22023';
   306	  end if;
   307	
   308	  -- Verificér node er team + aktiv på v_effective_from.
   309	  if not exists (
   310	    select 1 from core_identity.org_node_versions
   311	    where node_id = v_node_id
   312	      and node_type = 'team'
   313	      and is_active = true
   314	      and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   315	      and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   316	  ) then
   317	    raise exception 'client_placement_requires_active_team: %', v_node_id
   318	      using errcode = 'P0001';
   319	  end if;
   320	
   321	  select * into v_active
   322	  from core_identity.client_node_placements
   323	  where client_id = v_client_id
   324	    and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   325	    and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   326	  limit 1;
   327	
   328	  if not found then
   329	    insert into core_identity.client_node_placements
   330	      (client_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   331	    select v_client_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from,
   332	      (select min(effective_from) from core_identity.client_node_placements
   333	       where client_id = v_client_id and effective_from > v_effective_from),
   334	      p_pending_change_id;
   335	  elsif v_active.effective_from = v_effective_from then
   336	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   337	    set node_id = v_node_id,
   338	        created_by_pending_change_id = coalesce(p_pending_change_id, created_by_pending_change_id),
   339	        updated_at = now()
   340	    where id = v_active.id;
   341	  else
   342	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   343	    set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   344	    where id = v_active.id;
   345	
   346	    insert into core_identity.client_node_placements
   347	      (client_id, node_id, effective_from, effective_to, created_by_pending_change_id)
   348	    values
   349	      (v_client_id, v_node_id, v_effective_from, v_active.effective_to, p_pending_change_id);
   350	  end if;
   351	end;
   352	$$;
   353	
   354	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_place(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   355	
   356	-- ─── _apply_client_close (close-handler — placement-tabel) ────────────────
   357	create or replace function core_identity._apply_client_close(
   358	  p_payload jsonb,
   359	  p_pending_change_id uuid
   360	) returns void
   361	language plpgsql
   362	security definer
   363	set search_path = ''
   364	as $$
   365	declare
   366	  v_client_id uuid;
   367	  v_effective_from date;
   368	  v_active record;
   369	begin
   370	  v_client_id := (p_payload->>'client_id')::uuid;
   371	  v_effective_from := (p_payload->>'effective_from')::date;
   372	
   373	  if v_client_id is null or v_effective_from is null then
   374	    raise exception 'invalid_payload: client_id + effective_from required'
   375	      using errcode = '22023';
   376	  end if;
   377	
   378	  select * into v_active
   379	  from core_identity.client_node_placements
   380	  where client_id = v_client_id
   381	    and effective_from <= v_effective_from
   382	    and (effective_to is null or effective_to > v_effective_from)
   383	  limit 1;
   384	
   385	  if not found then
   386	    return;
   387	  elsif v_active.effective_from = v_effective_from then
   388	    delete from core_identity.client_node_placements where id = v_active.id;
   389	  elsif v_active.effective_to = v_effective_from then
   390	    return;
   391	  else
   392	    update core_identity.client_node_placements
   393	    set effective_to = v_effective_from, updated_at = now()
   394	    where id = v_active.id;
   395	  end if;
   396	end;
   397	$$;
   398	
   399	revoke execute on function core_identity._apply_client_close(jsonb, uuid) from public, anon, authenticated;
   400

docs/strategi/stork-2-0-master-plan.md:1933:| 36  | Trin 10 (2026-05-21): §1.8 omskrevet til at matche faktisk klient-skabelon-implementation. Pre-fundament-tekst om `anonymized_at`-kolonne, match-rolle-koncept + crm_match_id-rolle, pr-klient felt-definitions-registry, dispatching i `audit_filter_values`-special-case fjernet som scope-justeret. Klient lever i `core_identity.clients` (T1 droppede D5's `public.clients`); is_active erstatter anonymized_at (krav-dok §2.5.1: ikke-anonymiseret); logo (bytea+content_type+filename) med PII-hashing i audit; client_field_definitions globalt registry; aktiv-check i client_node_place wrapper + \_apply_client_place med employee-id-baseret superadmin-bypass for cron-context. §4 trin 10-række rettet: migration + crm_match_id fjernet (mathias-afgoerelser 2026-05-20 "Trin 10 scope-præcisering"). G057 + G058 registreret som teknisk gæld.   |

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:241:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:245:| `core_compliance.is_permanent_allowed(p_table_schema, p_table_name, p_column_name)` allowlist          | `supabase/migrations/20260514180400_d1b_is_permanent_allowed.sql:14-46`                                        | IMMUTABLE-funktion med hardkodet VALUES-blok. Trin 10 SKAL tilføje `core_identity.clients` + `core_identity.client_field_definitions` til allowlist hvis retention_type='permanent' skal bruges.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:287:- Etablering af `core_identity.client_field_definitions`-tabel fra bunden (uden match_role)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:293:- SECURITY DEFINER RPC'er: client_upsert (uden logo), client_set_active, client_field_definition_upsert (uden p_match_role), client_logo_set, client_logo_clear, client_logo_get, client_get, client_list, client_field_definitions_list
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:324:**Begrundelse:** Default-null på logo-parametre i client_upsert ville utilsigtet slette logo ved almindelig UPDATE (datatab). Dedikeret `client_logo_set` + `client_logo_clear` + `client_logo_get` adskiller logo-håndtering eksplicit.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:326:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:328:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:334:### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:348:  - **Plan-konsekvens:** Global `client_field_definitions` valgt frem for pr-klient (enklere; forretningsgang opfyldes via fields jsonb pr. klient).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:393:    'Trin 10: klient-master. name er identifikator; fields jsonb indeholder pr-klient værdier per client_field_definitions. is_active toggle erstatter DELETE (krav-dok §2.5.2). Logo som bytea (krav-dok §2.4). Klient anonymiseres ikke (krav-dok §2.5.1) — derfor ingen anonymized_at-kolonne.';
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:430:- **Migration-fil:** `supabase/migrations/<ts>_t10_clients_table.sql`

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:3078:255:  'D5: D2-logik + client-special-case. Top-level direct-PII hashes via data_field_definitions. clients.fields jsonb-walking via client_field_definitions (pii_level=direct, is_active=true).';
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:3087:516:  ('public', 'client_field_definitions', 'is_active',
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:3219:T10.5 filtrerer `client_field_definitions` med `pii_level='direct' and is_active = true`. Hvis et direct-PII felt senere sættes inactive, men eksisterende `clients.fields` stadig indeholder key’en, bliver værdien ikke længere hashed i audit-log ved client update. Det er datalæk i audit-flowet.  
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-1.md:3235:T10.5 filtrerer `client_field_definitions` med `pii_level='direct' and is_active = true`. Hvis et direct-PII felt senere sættes inactive, men eksisterende `clients.fields` stadig indeholder key’en, bliver værdien ikke længere hashed i audit-log ved client update. Det er datalæk i audit-flowet.  
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:254:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:258:| `core_compliance.is_permanent_allowed(p_table_schema, p_table_name, p_column_name)` allowlist          | `supabase/migrations/20260514180400_d1b_is_permanent_allowed.sql:14-46`                                        | IMMUTABLE-funktion med hardkodet VALUES-blok. Trin 10 SKAL tilføje `core_identity.clients` + `core_identity.client_field_definitions` til allowlist hvis retention_type='permanent' skal bruges.                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:300:- Etablering af `core_identity.client_field_definitions`-tabel fra bunden (uden match_role)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:306:- SECURITY DEFINER RPC'er: client_upsert (uden logo), client_set_active, client_field_definition_upsert (uden p_match_role), client_logo_set, client_logo_clear, client_logo_get, client_get, client_list, client_field_definitions_list
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:337:**Begrundelse:** Default-null på logo-parametre i client_upsert ville utilsigtet slette logo ved almindelig UPDATE (datatab). Dedikeret `client_logo_set` + `client_logo_clear` + `client_logo_get` adskiller logo-håndtering eksplicit.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:339:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:341:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:347:### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:361:  - **Plan-konsekvens:** Global `client_field_definitions` valgt frem for pr-klient (enklere; forretningsgang opfyldes via fields jsonb pr. klient).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:409:    'Trin 10: klient-master. name er identifikator; fields jsonb indeholder pr-klient værdier per client_field_definitions. is_active toggle erstatter DELETE (krav-dok §2.5.2). Logo som bytea (krav-dok §2.4). Klient anonymiseres ikke (krav-dok §2.5.1) — derfor ingen anonymized_at-kolonne.';

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:1080:- **Hvad:** Genskab D5's clients-special-case-mønster: walker `clients.fields` jsonb og hashes hver key der har `pii_level='direct'` i `client_field_definitions`. **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** ingen `is_active = true`-filter på direct-PII keys — ellers ville deaktivering af et felt skabe datalæk for værdier i eksisterende fields jsonb. Validation-trigger T10.6 behandler stadig inactive som ukendt-key (LENIENT warning), men audit-hashing rammer alle direct-PII definitioner. Resten af T1-logikken bevares uændret.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:4115:KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL: T10.10/T10.5 gør audit-hashing afhængig af mutable `client_field_definitions.key/pii_level`.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:4117:Eksempel-row: direct field `billing_email`; `clients.fields = {"billing_email":"a@b.dk"}`. Hvis `client_field_definition_upsert` senere ændrer samme definition til key=`billing_contact` eller `pii_level='none'`, matcher T10.5 ikke længere den gamle key. Næste audit af klient-rækken kan derfor skrive eksisterende direct PII i klartekst. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename/pii-downgrade. Løs: blokér key-change og direct→non-direct for eksisterende definitions, eller bevar historiske direct keys i audit-lookup.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:4124:KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL: T10.10/T10.5 gør audit-hashing afhængig af mutable `client_field_definitions.key/pii_level`.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-20-trin-10-runde-2.md:4126:Eksempel-row: direct field `billing_email`; `clients.fields = {"billing_email":"a@b.dk"}`. Hvis `client_field_definition_upsert` senere ændrer samme definition til key=`billing_contact` eller `pii_level='none'`, matcher T10.5 ikke længere den gamle key. Næste audit af klient-rækken kan derfor skrive eksisterende direct PII i klartekst. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename/pii-downgrade. Løs: blokér key-change og direct→non-direct for eksisterende definitions, eller bevar historiske direct keys i audit-lookup.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:61:| 3   | MELLEM   | T10.15             | Smoke-test dækker FK-eksistens + ON DELETE RESTRICT, men ikke det vigtigste forretningskrav (krav-dok §2.5.2: inaktiv klient kan ikke vælges).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   | **ACCEPT.** Ny separat smoke-test `t10_client_active_check.sql` med 4 scenarier: aktiv place success, inaktiv place rejection (22023), pending-mens-aktiv + deaktiver + apply rejection (P0001), close virker på inaktiv klient.                                                                                                                                                                                   | T10.15 + ny test-fil          |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:62:| 4   | LAV      | T10.4 + Konklusion | "alle 9 kolonner" + "(9 kolonner)" på `client_field_definitions` — SQL har 10 rækker (id, key, display_name, field_type, required, pii_level, display_order, is_active, created_at, updated_at). Plus konklusion-historik siger T10.4 ON CONFLICT er "DEFER", men V6 gjorde det obligatorisk. Codex V1-fund-tabel siger stadig "DEFER → G-nummer".                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               | **ACCEPT.** Tekstrettelser: 9→10 på `client_field_definitions`; opdatér V1-fund-tabel (linje 68) og Konklusion-historik (linje 1335) til at reflektere V6's ACCEPT.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                | T10.4 + linje 68 + linje 1335 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:78:| 3   | KRITISK/FUNKTIONELT | T10.1 + T10.2 + T10.8 + T10.9 + T10.11 + T10.12 | `has_permission(p_page, NULL, false)` med `p_tab_key=NULL` springer tab-resolver over (`20260518000010_t9_seed_owners.sql:35`) og prøver kun page/area-grants. T10.13 seeder kun TAB-grants → read-paths matcher INGEN grant og returnerer false → SELECT-policy + read-RPC'er tilbageholder data for legitime brugere med kun `clients/manage`-grant. | Mathias-terminal | **ACCEPT.** Skift alle read-paths til tab-aware: `has_permission('clients', 'manage', false)` og `has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', false)`. Berører SELECT-policies (T10.1 + T10.2), client_get/client_list/client_field_definitions_list (T10.12), client_logo_get (T10.11). Write-paths bruger allerede 'manage' tab — konsistent.                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:79:| 4   | KRITISK-FABRIKATION | T10.16                                          | Plan refererer `FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS`-allowlist i scripts/fitness.mjs, men den findes IKKE. Master-plan §3 punkt 19 specificerer fitness-checken men den er ikke implementeret. T9-migration-kommentar (`20260518000004_t9_client_node_placements.sql:5`) er forhåndsdokumentation, ikke nuværende fitness-check.                                    | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Omformulér T10.16: i stedet for "fjern client_id fra allowlist", verificér at FK-coverage-checken er implementeret; hvis ikke, ingen fitness-script-ændring nødvendig for FK. **Plus** tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (fund #5). G-nummer-kandidat for "FK-coverage-fitness-check ikke implementeret per master-plan §3.19". |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:80:| 5   | KRITISK             | T10.12 client_field_definitions_list            | RPC bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` — matcher fitness-check `legacy-is-active-readers` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:830-892`) regex. client_field_definitions har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne), så funktionen skal allowlist'es i `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS`.                                                          | Code-validering  | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til allowlisten via T10.16's fitness-script-ændring.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:81:| 6   | KRITISK             | T10.15 `t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql`      | Smoke-test INSERT'er i `core_identity.client_node_placements` som er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:93:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.1 + T10.2 | Tabellerne har kun `GRANT SELECT to authenticated`. Mangler `GRANT INSERT, UPDATE` der er nødvendigt før RLS-policy/session-var-vejen kan virke for write-RPC'erne (T10.8-T10.11). Bryder niveau 1-prefixens GRANT + policy + session-var-tre-pak. | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `grant insert, update on table core_identity.clients to authenticated` i T10.1 og tilsvarende for `client_field_definitions` i T10.2. Ingen DELETE-grant (inaktivering via is_active, ikke DELETE). Matcher T1's mønster for `core_compliance.data_field_definitions`. | T10.1 + T10.2 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:113:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.10 / T10.5 | Audit-hashing afhænger af mutable `client_field_definitions.key`/`pii_level`. Hvis felt-definitionen senere får ny `key` eller `pii_level='none'`, vil eksisterende `clients.fields`-værdier skrives i klartekst i audit. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. Tilføj smoke-test der verificerer begge invariants. | T10.10 + T10.15                    |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:144:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:172:| `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` i fitness-script                                                   | `scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`                                                                                  | Allowlist for funktioner der bruger `is_active = true` filter uden tilsvarende `status = 'active'`-check. Trin 10 tilføjer `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` (T10.16) fordi `client_field_definitions` har kun is_active, ingen status-kolonne. **FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS findes IKKE** — master-plan §3.19 ikke implementeret (V6-fund #4).                                                 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:191:- Etablering af `core_identity.client_field_definitions`-tabel fra bunden (uden match_role)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:197:- SECURITY DEFINER RPC'er: client_upsert (uden logo), client_set_active, client_field_definition_upsert (uden p_match_role), client_logo_set, client_logo_clear, client_logo_get, client_get, client_list, client_field_definitions_list

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:228:**Begrundelse:** Default-null på logo-parametre i client_upsert ville utilsigtet slette logo ved almindelig UPDATE (datatab). Dedikeret `client_logo_set` + `client_logo_clear` + `client_logo_get` adskiller logo-håndtering eksplicit.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:230:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:232:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:238:### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:252:  - **Plan-konsekvens:** Global `client_field_definitions` valgt frem for pr-klient (enklere; forretningsgang opfyldes via fields jsonb pr. klient).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:492:    'Trin 10: klient-master. name er identifikator; fields jsonb indeholder pr-klient værdier per client_field_definitions. is_active toggle erstatter DELETE (krav-dok §2.5.2). Logo som bytea (krav-dok §2.4). Klient anonymiseres ikke (krav-dok §2.5.1) — derfor ingen anonymized_at-kolonne.';

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:1213:- **Hvad:** SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC for client_field_definitions. has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true). **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE forbyder ændring af `key` (audit-PII-hash i clients.fields ville miste reference); UPDATE forbyder pii_level direct → non-direct (eksisterende værdier ville pludselig skrives i klartekst i audit). For at ændre `key`: marker den gamle definition `is_active=false` og INSERT en ny. For at sænke pii-niveau: behandl som ny definition.

Mangler `GRANT INSERT, UPDATE` der er nødvendigt før RLS-policy/session-var-vejen kan virke for write-RPC'erne (T10.8-T10.11). Bryder niveau 1-prefixens GRANT + policy + session-var-tre-pak. | **ACCEPT.** Tilføj `grant insert, update on table core_identity.clients to authenticated` i T10.1 og tilsvarende for `client_field_definitions` i T10.2. Ingen DELETE-grant (inaktivering via is_active, ikke DELETE). Matcher T1's mønster for `core_compliance.data_field_definitions`. | T10.1 + T10.2 |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:1313:130:| `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` i fitness-script                                                   | `scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`                                                                                  | Allowlist for funktioner der bruger `is_active = true` filter uden tilsvarende `status = 'active'`-check. Trin 10 tilføjer `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` (T10.16) fordi `client_field_definitions` har kun is_active, ingen status-kolonne. **FK_COVERAGE_EXEMPTIONS findes IKKE** — master-plan §3.19 ikke implementeret (V6-fund #4).                                                 |

UPDATE af pii_level direct → none afvises (errcode 22023). pii_level none → indirect → direct accepteres.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:1397:1316:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_node_placements_fk.sql` | FK virker: INSERT med ikke-eksisterende client_id fejler. DELETE af klient med åbne placements fejler RESTRICT. **V6 (Code-validering fund #6):** Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (linje-niveau) — `core_identity.client_node_placements` er på `TX_WRAP_REQUIRED_FOR_TEST_INSERT` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:110`). Fitness-check `db-test-tx-wrap-on-immutable-insert` blokerer ellers.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:1398:1318:  | `supabase/tests/smoke/t10_client_active_check.sql` (V7)  | T1: opret aktiv klient → `client_node_place` succeeds → pending oprettes → approve+apply succeeds → placement findes. T2: `client_set_active(client_id, false)` → ny `client_node_place` på samme klient + nyt team → forvent **22023 `client_inactive`**. T3 (apply-path-scenarie Mathias #1): opret pending mens klient aktiv → deaktiver klient → approve+apply → forvent **P0001 `apply_client_place: client_inactive`**. T4: `client_node_close` på inaktiv klient → success (ingen aktiv-check her). **T5 superadmin-bypass (Mathias 2026-05-21):** med superadmin-auth, place på inaktiv klient → success (bypass på aktiv-check, ikke på eksistens-check). Test SKAL være `begin;` + `rollback;`-wrapped (`client_node_placements` på TX_WRAP_REQUIRED). |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:1402:1329:  2. **R7d-allowlist (KRÆVET):** Tilføj `core_identity.client_field_definitions_list` til `LEGACY_IS_ACTIVE_EXEMPT_FUNCTIONS` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:149-154`). RPC'en bruger `where p_include_inactive or is_active = true` for at filtrere aktive felt-definitioner. `client_field_definitions` har KUN is_active (ingen status-kolonne) — matcher allowliste-kommentaren: "T9-tabellerne har is_active som lifecycle-signal alene; ingen status-kolonne. Disse er allowlist'et nedenfor."
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-7.md:1407:1339:    "core_identity.client_field_definitions_list", // V6 — T10.12 RPC; client_field_definitions har kun is_active, ingen status

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:244:| 1   | KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL | T10.10 / T10.5 | Audit-hashing afhænger af mutable `client_field_definitions.key`/`pii_level`. Hvis felt-definitionen senere får ny `key` eller `pii_level='none'`, vil eksisterende `clients.fields`-værdier skrives i klartekst i audit. V2-fixet for `is_active=false` dækker ikke key-rename eller pii-downgrade. | **ACCEPT.** Gør `key` og `pii_level` effektivt immutable for eksisterende definitions via T10.10's RPC: blokér UPDATE af `key`; blokér `pii_level` direct → non-direct. Tilføj smoke-test der verificerer begge invariants. | T10.10 + T10.15                    |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:275:| T1-drop af D5's public-schema                                                                          | `supabase/migrations/20260514120000_t1_drop_public.sql:32-92`                                                  | Dropper `public.clients`, `public.client_field_definitions`, `public.client_upsert`, `public.client_field_definition_upsert`, `public.clients_validate_fields`, `public.audit_filter_values`, `public.is_admin()`, `public.stork_audit()` etc. INGEN post-T1 migration genskaber clients.                                                                                                               |
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:322:- Etablering af `core_identity.client_field_definitions`-tabel fra bunden (uden match_role)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:328:- SECURITY DEFINER RPC'er: client_upsert (uden logo), client_set_active, client_field_definition_upsert (uden p_match_role), client_logo_set, client_logo_clear, client_logo_get, client_get, client_list, client_field_definitions_list
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:359:**Begrundelse:** Default-null på logo-parametre i client_upsert ville utilsigtet slette logo ved almindelig UPDATE (datatab). Dedikeret `client_logo_set` + `client_logo_clear` + `client_logo_get` adskiller logo-håndtering eksplicit.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:361:### `clients` + `client_field_definitions` får retention_type='permanent' (kræver allowlist-udvidelse)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:363:**Begrundelse:** Krav-dok §2.5.1 + §2.5.2 siger klient-rækken bevares evigt; client_field_definitions er konfig-tabel der også bevares evigt. `permanent` matcher denne semantik bedst. D1b-allowlist skal udvides for at retention-validate-trigger ikke blokerer.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:369:### `client_field_definitions` er global (ikke pr-klient)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:383:  - **Plan-konsekvens:** Global `client_field_definitions` valgt frem for pr-klient (enklere; forretningsgang opfyldes via fields jsonb pr. klient).
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:431:    'Trin 10: klient-master. name er identifikator; fields jsonb indeholder pr-klient værdier per client_field_definitions. is_active toggle erstatter DELETE (krav-dok §2.5.2). Logo som bytea (krav-dok §2.4). Klient anonymiseres ikke (krav-dok §2.5.1) — derfor ingen anonymized_at-kolonne.';
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:468:- **Migration-fil:** `supabase/migrations/<ts>_t10_clients_table.sql`

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:658:- **Hvad:** Genskab D5's clients-special-case-mønster: walker `clients.fields` jsonb og hashes hver key der har `pii_level='direct'` i `client_field_definitions`. **V2 (Codex V1 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** ingen `is_active = true`-filter på direct-PII keys — ellers ville deaktivering af et felt skabe datalæk for værdier i eksisterende fields jsonb. Validation-trigger T10.6 behandler stadig inactive som ukendt-key (LENIENT warning), men audit-hashing rammer alle direct-PII definitioner. Resten af T1-logikken bevares uændret.

docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:992:### T10.10 — `client_field_definition_upsert` RPC (uden p_match_role; V3: immutable key + pii_level-downgrade-block)
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:995:- **Hvad:** SECURITY DEFINER write-RPC for client_field_definitions. has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true). **V3 (Codex V2 KRITISK-SIKKERHEDSHUL):** UPDATE forbyder ændring af `key` (audit-PII-hash i clients.fields ville miste reference); UPDATE forbyder pii_level direct → non-direct (eksisterende værdier ville pludselig skrives i klartekst i audit). For at ændre `key`: marker den gamle definition `is_active=false` og INSERT en ny. For at sænke pii-niveau: behandl som ny definition.
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:999:  create or replace function core_identity.client_field_definition_upsert(
docs/coordination/codex-reviews/2026-05-21-trin-10-runde-4.md:1017:    if not core_identity.has_permission('client_field_definitions', 'manage', true) then

docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:27:| 1   | TEKNISK-BLOKERING | T10.15 `t10_client_active_check.sql` | T9 seed (`20260518000004:228-229`) sætter `undo_settings.undo_period_seconds = 24*3600` for `client_place`/`client_close`. `pending_change_apply` stopper med `not_yet_due` før dispatch til `_apply_client_place`. Test rammer due-gate, ikke aktiv-checken. | **ACCEPT.** T10.15 udvidet med setup-disciplin: BEGIN-blokken sætter `set_config('stork.t9_write_authorized', 'true', true)` + UPDATE `undo_settings SET undo_period_seconds = 0 WHERE change_type IN ('client_place', 'client_close')` transaction-local. ROLLBACK ved test-slut sikrer ingen lækage. | T10.15     |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:43:| 1   | KRITISK           | Fundament-tjek               | Tabellen nævner kun T10.8/T10.9/T10.10/T10.11 + T10.13. V10 tilføjer/ændrer write-veje i T10.7b (`client_node_place`, `client_node_close`, `_apply_client_place`) + T10.10a (`client_field_definition_set_active`) — manglende krydstjek. | **ACCEPT.** Fundament-tjek-tabel udvidet med T10.7b (GRANT/policy/session-var + apply-dispatch + jsonb payload producer/consumer) og T10.10a. Eksempel-row-tjek udvidet med immutable-key + pii-downgrade-block + active-check. |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:69:| 2   | G-NUMMER-KANDIDAT → ADOPT | T10.13                     | Tab/grant-INSERT-queries filtrerer på `p.name in ('clients', 'client_field_definitions')` uden at scope til `org_structure`-area. Hvis nogen senere tilføjer page med samme navn i andet area (usandsynligt, men ikke robust).                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | **ADOPT.** Trivielt fix: scope queries til `org_structure`-area via JOIN på area_id.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    | T10.13         |
docs/coordination/arkiv/trin-10-plan.md:83:| 1   | KRITISK  | T10.6                  | `clients_validate_fields()` trigger-funktion har `cfd.is_active = true` filter. Rammer fitness-check `legacy-is-active-readers` (`scripts/fitness.mjs:830-892`). T10.16 allowlister kun `client_field_definitions_list`.                                                                    | Codex runde 7     | **ACCEPT.** Udvid T10.16 med `core_identity.clients_validate_fields`. Forretningsmæssigt korrekt at filtrere på aktive felt-definitioner i validate-trigger (LENIENT: ukendte/inaktive keys → warning) — det er ikke R7d-pattern (employees-dual-column), bare lifecycle-signal. |
